<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     3→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     4→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     5→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     6→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     7→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     8→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey, $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    10→import { LayoutGrid, Minus, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../../nodes/GridContainerNode'
    14→
    15→interface GridEditDecoratorProps {
    16→  nodeKey: string
    17→  cols: number
    18→  gap: string
    19→  cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    20→}
    21→
    22→const COL_OPTIONS = [1, 2, 3, 4] as const
    23→
    24→export function GridEditDecorator({
    25→  nodeKey,
    26→  cols: initialCols,
    27→  gap,
    28→  cellEditors,
    29→}: GridEditDecoratorProps) {
    30→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    31→  const [currentCols, setCurrentCols] = useState(initialCols)
    32→
    33→  useEffect(() => {
    34→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    35→      editorState.read(() => {
    36→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    37→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    38→          setCurrentCols(node.getCols())
    39→        }
    40→      })
    41→    })
    42→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    43→
    44→  const handleSetCols = useCallback(
    45→    (cols: number) => {
    46→      editor.update(() => {
    47→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    48→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    49→          node.setCols(cols)
    50→        }
    51→      })
    52→    },
    53→    [editor, nodeKey],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleAddRow = useCallback(() => {
    57→    editor.update(() => {
    58→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    59→      if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    60→        node.addCells(node.getCols())
    61→      }
    62→    })
    63→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    64→
    65→  const handleRemoveRow = useCallback(() => {
    66→    editor.update(() => {
    67→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    68→      if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
    69→      const cols = node.getCols()
    70→      const editors = node.getCellEditors()
    71→      if (editors.length <= cols) return
    72→
    73→      const lastRow = editors.slice(-cols)
    74→      const allEmpty = lastRow.every((cellEditor) =>
    75→        cellEditor
    76→          .getEditorState()
    77→          .read(() => $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0),
    78→      )
    79→      if (!allEmpty) return
    80→      node.removeCells(cols)
    81→    })
    82→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <>
    86→      <div
    87→        className="rich-grid-toolbar"
    88→        onMouseDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
    89→      >
    90→        <span className="rich-grid-toolbar-icon">
    91→          <LayoutGrid size={14} />
    92→        </span>
    93→        {COL_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    94→          <button
    95→            key={n}
    96→            type="button"
    97→            className={`rich-grid-col-btn${n === currentCols ? ' rich-grid-col-btn-active' : ''}`}
    98→            onClick={() => handleSetCols(n)}
    99→            aria-label={`${n} columns`}
   100→          >
   101→            {n}
   102→          </button>
   103→        ))}
   104→        <div className="rich-grid-toolbar-divider" />
   105→        <button
   106→          type="button"
   107→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   108→          onClick={handleAddRow}
   109→          aria-label="Add row"
   110→        >
   111→          <Plus size={14} />
   112→        </button>
   113→        <button
   114→          type="button"
   115→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   116→          onClick={handleRemoveRow}
   117→          aria-label="Remove row"
   118→        >
   119→          <Minus size={14} />
   120→        </button>
   121→      </div>
   122→      <div
   123→        className="rich-grid-inner"
   124→        style={{
   125→          gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${currentCols}, 1fr)`,
   126→          gap,
   127→        }}
   128→      >
   129→        {cellEditors.map((cellEditor, i) => (
   130→          <div key={i} className="rich-grid-cell">
   131→            <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={cellEditor}>
   132→              <RichTextPlugin
   133→                contentEditable={
   134→                  <ContentEditable
   135→                    className="rich-grid-cell-editable"
   136→                    aria-placeholder=""
   137→                    placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
   138→                  />
   139→                }
   140→                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   141→              />
   142→              <ListPlugin />
   143→              <LinkPlugin />
   144→            </LexicalNestedComposer>
   145→          </div>
   146→        ))}
   147→      </div>
   148→    </>
   149→  )
   150→}
   151→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 13:14:33Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    10→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    11→
    12→export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13→  snapshot: string
    14→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      showCloseButton: false,
   175→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   176→    })
   177→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName])
   178→
   179→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   180→  useEffect(() => {
   181→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   182→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   183→        e.preventDefault()
   184→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   185→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   186→          showConfirmDialog()
   187→        } else {
   188→          dismiss()
   189→        }
   190→      }
   191→    }
   192→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   193→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   195→
   196→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   197→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   198→      showConfirmDialog()
   199→    } else {
   200→      dismiss()
   201→    }
   202→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   203→
   204→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   205→    performSave()
   206→  }, [performSave])
   207→
   208→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   209→    const editor = editorRef.current
   210→    if (!editor) return
   211→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   212→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   213→      type: 'application/json',
   214→    })
   215→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   216→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   217→    a.href = url
   218→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   219→    a.click()
   220→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   221→  }, [])
   222→
   223→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   224→    const editor = editorRef.current
   225→    if (!editor) return
   226→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   227→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   228→  }, [])
   229→
   230→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   231→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   232→  }, [savedRef])
   233→
   234→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   235→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   236→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   237→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   238→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   239→      performSave()
   240→    },
   241→    [performSave],
   242→  )
   243→
   244→  return (
   245→    <>
   246→      {/* Header */}
   247→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   248→        <span
   249→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   250→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   251→        />
   252→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   254→
   255→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   256→          {saveSnapshot && (
   257→            <>
   258→              <SegmentedControl
   259→                items={[
   260→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   261→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   262→                ]}
   263→                value={storageMode}
   264→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   265→              />
   266→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   267→              <button
   268→                type="button"
   269→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   270→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   271→                disabled={isSaving}
   272→              >
   273→                <Upload size={14} />
   274→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   275→              </button>
   276→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   277→            </>
   278→          )}
   279→          <button
   280→            type="button"
   281→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   282→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   283→          >
   284→            <Download size={14} />
   285→            JSON
   286→          </button>
   287→          <button
   288→            type="button"
   289→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   290→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   291→          >
   292→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   293→            Copy
   294→          </button>
   295→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   296→            <>
   297→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   298→              <button
   299→                type="button"
   300→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   301→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   302→                title={savedRef}
   303→              >
   304→                {savedRef}
   305→              </button>
   306→            </>
   307→          )}
   308→        </div>
   309→
   310→        <button
   311→          type="button"
   312→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   313→          onClick={attemptClose}
   314→        >
   315→          <X size={18} />
   316→        </button>
   317→      </div>
   318→
   319→      {/* Canvas */}
   320→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   321→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   322→      </div>
   323→    </>
   324→  )
   325→}
   326→
   327→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   328→
   329→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   330→  snapshot,
   331→  onSnapshotChange,
   332→}) => {
   333→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   334→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   335→  const {
   336→    snapshot: initialData,
   337→    loading: dataLoading,
   338→    error: dataError,
   339→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   340→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   341→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   342→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   343→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   344→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   345→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   346→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   347→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   348→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   349→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   350→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   351→
   352→  useEffect(() => {
   353→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   354→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   355→    }
   356→  }, [initialData])
   357→
   358→  useEffect(() => {
   359→    import('tldraw')
   360→      .then((mod) => {
   361→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   362→        setLibLoading(false)
   363→      })
   364→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   365→  }, [])
   366→
   367→  useEffect(() => {
   368→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   369→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   370→        colorScheme: theme,
   371→      })
   372→    }
   373→  }, [theme])
   374→
   375→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   376→    (editor: any) => {
   377→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   378→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   379→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   380→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   381→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   382→    },
   383→    [theme],
   384→  )
   385→
   386→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   387→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   388→    presentDialog({
   389→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   390→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   391→          dismiss={dismiss}
   392→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   393→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   394→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   395→          theme={theme}
   396→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   397→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   398→          onClose={(doc) => {
   399→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   400→          }}
   401→        />
   402→      ),
   403→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   404→      portalClassName,
   405→      showCloseButton: false,
   406→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   407→    })
   408→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   409→
   410→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   411→
   412→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   413→    return (
   414→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   415→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   416→      </div>
   417→    )
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  if (dataError) {
   421→    return (
   422→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   423→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   424→      </div>
   425→    )
   426→  }
   427→
   428→  return (
   429→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   430→      <TldrawComponent
   431→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   432→        hideUi
   433→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   434→      />
   435→
   436→      <button
   437→        type="button"
   438→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   439→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   440→      >
   441→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   442→          <Pencil size={16} />
   443→          Edit Whiteboard
   444→        </span>
   445→      </button>
   446→    </div>
   447→  )
   448→}
   449→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  GalleryImage,
     3→  GalleryRendererProps,
     4→  SlashMenuItemConfig,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import { createRendererDecoration } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     7→import type {
     8→  EditorConfig,
     9→  LexicalEditor,
    10→  LexicalNode,
    11→  NodeKey,
    12→  SerializedLexicalNode,
    13→  Spread,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    16→import { Images } from 'lucide-react'
    17→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    18→import { createElement } from 'react'
    19→
    20→import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'
    21→
    22→export type SerializedGalleryNode = Spread<
    23→  {
    24→    images: GalleryImage[]
    25→    layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    26→  },
    27→  SerializedLexicalNode
    28→>
    29→
    30→export interface GalleryNodePayload {
    31→  images: GalleryImage[]
    32→  layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    33→}
    34→
    35→export class GalleryNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    36→  __images: GalleryImage[]
    37→  __layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    38→
    39→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    40→    {
    41→      title: 'Gallery',
    42→      icon: createElement(Images, { size: 20 }),
    43→      description: 'Image gallery grid',
    44→      keywords: ['gallery', 'images', 'grid'],
    45→      section: 'MEDIA',
    46→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    47→        editor.update(() => {
    48→          $insertNodes([$createGalleryNode({ images: [] })])
    49→        })
    50→      },
    51→    },
    52→  ]
    53→
    54→  static getType(): string {
    55→    return 'gallery'
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  static clone(node: GalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    59→    return new GalleryNode(
    60→      {
    61→        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
    62→        layout: node.__layout,
    63→      },
    64→      node.__key,
    65→    )
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    69→    super(key)
    70→    this.__images = payload.images
    71→    this.__layout = payload.layout || 'grid'
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    75→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    76→    div.className = `rich-gallery rich-gallery-${this.__layout}`
    77→    return div
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    81→    return false
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  isInline(): boolean {
    85→    return false
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    89→    return $createGalleryNode({
    90→      images: serializedNode.images,
    91→      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    92→    })
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  exportJSON(): SerializedGalleryNode {
    96→    return {
    97→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    98→      type: 'gallery',
    99→      images: this.__images,
   100→      layout: this.__layout,
   101→      version: 1,
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  getImages(): GalleryImage[] {
   106→    return this.getLatest().__images
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  setImages(images: GalleryImage[]): void {
   110→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   111→    writable.__images = images
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getLayout(): 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel' {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__layout
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setLayout(layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    writable.__layout = layout
   121→  }
   122→
   123→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   124→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   125→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   126→    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
   127→      images: this.__images,
   128→      layout: this.__layout,
   129→      ...(isEditable && {
   130→        onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
   131→          editor.update(() => {
   132→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   133→            if (node) node.setImages(images)
   134→          })
   135→        },
   136→        onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
   137→          editor.update(() => {
   138→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   139→            if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
   140→          })
   141→        },
   142→      }),
   143→    }
   144→    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
   145→  }
   146→}
   147→
   148→export function $createGalleryNode(payload: GalleryNodePayload): GalleryNode {
   149→  return new GalleryNode(payload)
   150→}
   151→
   152→export function $isGalleryNode(
   153→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   154→): node is GalleryNode {
   155→  return node instanceof GalleryNode
   156→}
   157→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/alert.ts`

```text
     1→import { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  $createAlertQuoteNode,
     7→  AlertQuoteNode,
     8→  type AlertType,
     9→} from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    10→
    11→const ALERT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, AlertType> = {
    12→  NOTE: 'note',
    13→  TIP: 'tip',
    14→  IMPORTANT: 'important',
    15→  WARNING: 'warning',
    16→  CAUTION: 'caution',
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    20→  ...BASE,
    21→  dependencies: [AlertQuoteNode],
    22→  regExp: /^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|IMPORTANT|WARNING|CAUTION)\]\s*$/,
    23→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    24→    const typeKey = match[1]
    25→    const alertType = ALERT_TYPE_MAP[typeKey] || 'note'
    26→
    27→    const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)
    28→
    29→    const serializedChildren = children.map((child) => child.exportJSON())
    30→    const content = {
    31→      root: {
    32→        children: [
    33→          {
    34→            type: 'paragraph',
    35→            children: serializedChildren,
    36→            direction: null,
    37→            format: '',
    38→            indent: 0,
    39→            textFormat: 0,
    40→            textStyle: '',
    41→            version: 1,
    42→          },
    43→        ],
    44→        direction: null,
    45→        format: '',
    46→        indent: 0,
    47→        type: 'root',
    48→        version: 1,
    49→      },
    50→    } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    51→
    52→    const editorState = alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    53→    alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    54→
    55→    parentNode.replace(alertNode)
    56→  },
    57→}
    58→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import 'react-photo-view/dist/react-photo-view.css'
     2→
     3→import {
     4→  decodeThumbHash,
     5→  type GalleryImage,
     6→  type GalleryRendererProps,
     7→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     8→import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'
     9→import type { ComponentType, UIEventHandler } from 'react'
    10→import { memo, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    11→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
    12→import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'
    13→
    14→import * as css from './styles.css'
    15→
    16→const IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET = 60
    17→const CHILD_GAP = 15
    18→const AUTOPLAY_DURATION = 5000
    19→
    20→function throttle<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(
    21→  func: T,
    22→  wait: number,
    23→): T {
    24→  let timeout: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
    25→  return ((...args: Parameters<T>) => {
    26→    if (!timeout) {
    27→      timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    28→        func(...args)
    29→        timeout = null
    30→      }, wait)
    31→    }
    32→  }) as T
    33→}
    34→
    35→function clsx(...classes: (string | false | undefined | null)[]): string {
    36→  return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ')
    37→}
    38→
    39→function useThumbhashStyle(
    40→  image: GalleryImage,
    41→): React.CSSProperties | undefined {
    42→  return useMemo(() => {
    43→    if (!image.thumbhash) return
    44→    const url = decodeThumbHash(image.thumbhash)
    45→    if (!url) return
    46→    return { backgroundImage: `url(${url})`, backgroundSize: 'cover' }
    47→  }, [image.thumbhash])
    48→}
    49→
    50→export const GalleryRenderer: ComponentType<GalleryRendererProps> = ({
    51→  images,
    52→  layout,
    53→}) => {
    54→  const [containerRef, setContainerRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
    55→  const [, setUpdated] = useState({})
    56→  const memoedChildContainerWidthRef = useRef(0)
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!containerRef) return
    60→
    61→    const ob = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    62→      setUpdated({})
    63→      calChild(containerRef)
    64→    })
    65→
    66→    function calChild(containerRef: HTMLDivElement) {
    67→      const $child = containerRef.children.item(0)
    68→      if ($child) {
    69→        memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current = $child.clientWidth
    70→      }
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    calChild(containerRef)
    74→    ob.observe(containerRef)
    75→    return () => {
    76→      ob.disconnect()
    77→    }
    78→  }, [containerRef])
    79→
    80→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0)
    81→
    82→  const handleOnScroll: UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> = useCallback(
    83→    throttle<UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>>((e) => {
    84→      const $ = e.target as HTMLDivElement
    85→
    86→      const index = Math.floor(
    87→        ($.scrollLeft + IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET + 15) /
    88→          memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current,
    89→      )
    90→      setCurrentIndex(index)
    91→    }, 60),
    92→    [],
    93→  )
    94→
    95→  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
    96→    (i: number) => {
    97→      if (!containerRef) return
    98→
    99→      containerRef.scrollTo({
   100→        left: memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current * i,
   101→        behavior: 'smooth',
   102→      })
   103→    },
   104→    [containerRef],
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const autoplayTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null)
   108→  const isForward = useRef(true)
   109→  const autoplayRef = useRef(true)
   110→
   111→  const handleCancelAutoplay = useCallback(() => {
   112→    if (!autoplayRef.current) return
   113→
   114→    autoplayRef.current = false
   115→    if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   116→      clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   117→    }
   118→  }, [])
   119→
   120→  const { ref } = useInView({
   121→    initialInView: false,
   122→    triggerOnce: images.length < 2,
   123→    onChange(inView) {
   124→      if (images.length < 2 || !autoplayRef.current) return
   125→
   126→      if (inView) {
   127→        autoplayTimerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
   128→          setCurrentIndex((prev) => {
   129→            if (prev + 1 > images.length - 1 && isForward.current) {
   130→              isForward.current = false
   131→            }
   132→            if (prev - 1 < 0 && !isForward.current) {
   133→              isForward.current = true
   134→            }
   135→
   136→            const index = prev + (isForward.current ? 1 : -1)
   137→            handleScrollTo(index)
   138→            return index
   139→          })
   140→        }, AUTOPLAY_DURATION)
   141→      } else {
   142→        if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   143→          clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   144→        }
   145→      }
   146→    },
   147→  })
   148→
   149→  useEffect(
   150→    () => () => {
   151→      if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   152→        clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   153→      }
   154→    },
   155→    [],
   156→  )
   157→
   158→  if (images.length === 0) return null
   159→
   160→  const layoutClass =
   161→    layout === 'masonry'
   162→      ? css.galleryMasonry
   163→      : layout === 'carousel'
   164→        ? css.galleryCarousel
   165→        : css.galleryGrid
   166→
   167→  if (images.length === 1 || layout === 'grid' || layout === 'masonry') {
   168→    return (
   169→      <PhotoProvider>
   170→        <div className={clsx(css.gallery, layoutClass)}>
   171→          {images.map((image, index) => (
   172→            <GalleryFigure key={index} image={image} />
   173→          ))}
   174→        </div>
   175→      </PhotoProvider>
   176→    )
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return (
   180→    <PhotoProvider>
   181→      <div
   182→        className={clsx(css.gallery, css.galleryCarousel)}
   183→        ref={ref}
   184→        onTouchMove={handleCancelAutoplay}
   185→        onWheel={handleCancelAutoplay}
   186→      >
   187→        <div
   188→          className={css.galleryContainer}
   189→          onTouchStart={handleCancelAutoplay}
   190→          onScroll={handleOnScroll}
   191→          ref={setContainerRef}
   192→        >
   193→          {images.map((image, index) => (
   194→            <GalleryFigure
   195→              key={index}
   196→              image={image}
   197→              style={{
   198→                width: `calc(100% - ${IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET}px)`,
   199→                marginRight: `${CHILD_GAP}px`,
   200→              }}
   201→            />
   202→          ))}
   203→        </div>
   204→
   205→        {currentIndex > 0 && (
   206→          <button
   207→            className={clsx(css.galleryNav, css.galleryNavPrev)}
   208→            onClick={() => handleScrollTo(currentIndex - 1)}
   209→          >
   210→            <ChevronLeft size={18} />
   211→          </button>
   212→        )}
   213→        {currentIndex < images.length - 1 && (
   214→          <button
   215→            className={clsx(css.galleryNav, css.galleryNavNext)}
   216→            onClick={() => handleScrollTo(currentIndex + 1)}
   217→          >
   218→            <ChevronRight size={18} />
   219→          </button>
   220→        )}
   221→
   222→        <div className={css.galleryIndicators}>
   223→          {images.map((_, i) => (
   224→            <div
   225→              className={clsx(
   226→                css.galleryIndicator,
   227→                currentIndex === i && css.galleryIndicatorActive,
   228→              )}
   229→              key={i}
   230→              onClick={() => handleScrollTo(i)}
   231→            />
   232→          ))}
   233→        </div>
   234→      </div>
   235→    </PhotoProvider>
   236→  )
   237→}
   238→
   239→const GalleryFigure = memo(
   240→  ({ image, style }: { image: GalleryImage; style?: React.CSSProperties }) => {
   241→    const thumbStyle = useThumbhashStyle(image)
   242→
   243→    return (
   244→      <PhotoView src={image.src}>
   245→        <figure className={css.galleryItem} style={{ ...thumbStyle, ...style }}>
   246→          <img
   247→            src={image.src}
   248→            alt={image.alt || ''}
   249→            width={image.width}
   250→            height={image.height}
   251→            loading="lazy"
   252→            style={{ maxWidth: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
   253→          />
   254→        </figure>
   255→      </PhotoView>
   256→    )
   257→  },
   258→)
   259→
   260→export default memo(GalleryRenderer)
   261→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
     3→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     4→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     5→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     6→
     7→import { allNodes } from '../config'
     8→import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     9→import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
    10→import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
    11→import { HeadingAnchorPlugin } from '../plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
    14→import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    15→
    16→export function RichRenderer({
    17→  value,
    18→  variant = 'article',
    19→  theme = 'light',
    20→  className,
    21→  style,
    22→  as: Component = 'div',
    23→  rendererConfig,
    24→  extraNodes,
    25→}: RichRendererProps) {
    26→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    27→
    28→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    29→
    30→  const initialConfig = {
    31→    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    nodes,
    34→    editable: false,
    35→    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    36→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    37→      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    38→    },
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    43→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    44→        <RendererConfigProvider
    45→          config={rendererConfig}
    46→          mode="renderer"
    47→          variant={variant}
    48→        >
    49→          <Component
    50→            className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    51→            style={style}
    52→            data-theme={theme}
    53→          >
    54→            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    55→              <FootnotePlugin>
    56→                <RichTextPlugin
    57→                  contentEditable={
    58→                    <ContentEditable
    59→                      className="rich-content__body"
    60→                      style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                      aria-placeholder=""
    62→                      placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→                    />
    64→                  }
    65→                  ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→                />
    67→                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
    68→              </FootnotePlugin>
    69→            </LexicalComposer>
    70→          </Component>
    71→        </RendererConfigProvider>
    72→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    73→    </PortalThemeProvider>
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`

```text
     1→import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'
     5→
     6→import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     7→import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     8→import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'
     9→
    10→const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    11→  note: 'note',
    12→  info: 'note',
    13→  tip: 'tip',
    14→  success: 'tip',
    15→  important: 'important',
    16→  warning: 'warning',
    17→  warn: 'warning',
    18→  error: 'caution',
    19→  danger: 'caution',
    20→  caution: 'caution',
    21→}
    22→
    23→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    24→  ...BASE,
    25→  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
    26→  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
    27→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    28→    const type = match[1]
    29→    const params = match[2]
    30→
    31→    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
    32→      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]
    33→      const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
    36→        child.exportJSON(),
    37→      )
    38→      const content = {
    39→        root: {
    40→          children: [
    41→            {
    42→              type: 'paragraph',
    43→              children: serializedChildren,
    44→              direction: null,
    45→              format: '',
    46→              indent: 0,
    47→              textFormat: 0,
    48→              textStyle: '',
    49→              version: 1,
    50→            },
    51→          ],
    52→          direction: null,
    53→          format: '',
    54→          indent: 0,
    55→          type: 'root',
    56→          version: 1,
    57→        },
    58→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    59→
    60→      const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    61→      banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    62→
    63→      parentNode.replace(banner)
    64→      return
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    if (type === 'details') {
    68→      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
    69→      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'
    70→
    71→      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)
    72→
    73→      children.forEach((child) => {
    74→        details.append(child)
    75→      })
    76→
    77→      parentNode.replace(details)
    78→      return
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    82→    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    83→    children.forEach((child) => {
    84→      paragraph.append(child)
    85→    })
    86→    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
    87→  },
    88→}
    89→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/grid-container.ts`

```text
     1→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     2→import { $getRoot, type LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     3→
     4→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
     5→
     6→function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
     7→  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
     8→}
     9→
    10→export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    11→  dependencies: [],
    12→  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    13→    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    14→    const cells = node.getCellEditors().map((editor) =>
    15→      editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
    16→        return $getRoot().getTextContent()
    17→      }),
    18→    )
    19→    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    20→    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
    21→  },
    22→  regExp: /a^/,
    23→  replace: () => {},
    24→  type: 'element',
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import type { AlertType } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
     6→import { $createAlertQuoteNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
     7→
     8→export const INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND = createCommand<AlertType>('INSERT_ALERT')
     9→
    10→export function AlertPlugin() {
    11→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    12→
    13→  useEffect(() => {
    14→    return editor.registerCommand(
    15→      INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND,
    16→      (alertType) => {
    17→        $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)])
    18→        return true
    19→      },
    20→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21→    )
    22→  }, [editor])
    23→
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
```

```text
     1→import type { RichEditorProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import { BlockHandlePlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle'
     4→import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
     5→import { FloatingLinkEditorPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit'
     6→import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
     7→import {
     8→  TableCellResizerPlugin,
     9→  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
    10→} from '@haklex/rich-plugin-table'
    11→import { galleryNodes, TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    12→import {
    13→  codeSnippetEditNodes,
    14→  ConvertToLinkCardAction,
    15→  embedEditNodes,
    16→  EmbedPlugin,
    17→  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
    18→  katexEditNodes,
    19→  linkCardEditNodes,
    20→  PasteLinkCardPlugin,
    21→  TldrawPlugin,
    22→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'
    23→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    24→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    25→import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
    26→
    27→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    28→  TldrawNode,
    29→  ...embedEditNodes,
    30→  ...linkCardEditNodes,
    31→  ...katexEditNodes,
    32→  ...galleryNodes,
    33→  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
    34→]
    35→
    36→export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    37→  RichEditorProps,
    38→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    39→> {
    40→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    41→  actions?: ReactNode
    42→  selfHostnames?: string[]
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function ShiroEditor({
    46→  extraNodes,
    47→  actions,
    48→  children,
    49→  selfHostnames,
    50→  ...props
    51→}: ShiroEditorProps) {
    52→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    53→    () =>
    54→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    55→    [extraNodes],
    56→  )
    57→
    58→  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    59→    ({
    60→      url,
    61→      linkKey,
    62→      actionButtonClassName,
    63→    }: {
    64→      url: string
    65→      linkKey: string
    66→      actionButtonClassName: string
    67→    }) => (
    68→      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
    69→        url={url}
    70→        linkKey={linkKey}
    71→        className={actionButtonClassName}
    72→      />
    73→    ),
    74→    [],
    75→  )
    76→
    77→  return (
    78→    <RichEditor
    79→      {...props}
    80→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    81→      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    82→      actions={
    83→        <>
    84→          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    85→          {actions}
    86→        </>
    87→      }
    88→    >
    89→      <BlockHandlePlugin />
    90→      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
    91→      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
    92→      <TldrawPlugin />
    93→      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
    94→      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
    95→      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
    96→      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
    97→      {children}
    98→    </RichEditor>
    99→  )
   100→}
   101→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/FootnotePlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType, $parseSerializedNode } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6→import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
     7→import { FootnoteSectionNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
     8→
     9→export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
    10→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11→  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
    12→  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    13→    Record<string, number>
    14→  >({})
    15→  const pendingUpdateRef = useRef(false)
    16→
    17→  useEffect(() => {
    18→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    19→      editorState.read(() => {
    20→        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
    21→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    22→        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    23→        let counter = 1
    24→        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
    25→          const id = node.getIdentifier()
    26→          if (!seen.has(id)) {
    27→            seen.add(id)
    28→            numberMap[id] = counter++
    29→          }
    30→        }
    31→        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)
    32→
    33→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    34→
    35→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    36→          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
    37→        } else {
    38→          setDefinitions({})
    39→        }
    40→
    41→        if (!editor.isEditable() || pendingUpdateRef.current) return
    42→
    43→        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    44→          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    45→          queueMicrotask(() => {
    46→            editor.update(() => {
    47→              const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    48→              for (const s of sections) s.remove()
    49→            })
    50→            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    51→          })
    52→          return
    53→        }
    54→
    55→        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
    56→          const seenSnapshot = [...seen]
    57→          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    58→          queueMicrotask(() => {
    59→            editor.update(() => {
    60→              const root = $getRoot()
    61→              const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
    62→              for (const id of seenSnapshot) {
    63→                defs[id] = ''
    64→              }
    65→              const section = $parseSerializedNode({
    66→                type: 'footnote-section',
    67→                definitions: defs,
    68→                version: 1,
    69→              })
    70→              root.append(section)
    71→            })
    72→            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    73→          })
    74→        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    75→          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
    76→          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
    77→          const orphanIds = Object.keys(existingDefs).filter(
    78→            (id) => !seen.has(id),
    79→          )
    80→          if (missingIds.length > 0 || orphanIds.length > 0) {
    81→            pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    82→            queueMicrotask(() => {
    83→              editor.update(() => {
    84→                const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    85→                if (freshSections.length > 0) {
    86→                  for (const id of missingIds) {
    87→                    freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
    88→                  }
    89→                  for (const id of orphanIds) {
    90→                    freshSections[0].removeDefinition(id)
    91→                  }
    92→                }
    93→              })
    94→              pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    95→            })
    96→          }
    97→        }
    98→      })
    99→    })
   100→  }, [editor])
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   104→      definitions={definitions}
   105→      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
   106→    >
   107→      {children}
   108→    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   109→  )
   110→}
   111→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { HeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     6→  return (
     7→    text
     8→      .toLowerCase()
     9→      .trim()
    10→      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
    11→      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    12→      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    13→      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    14→  )
    15→}
    16→
    17→function deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
    18→  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
    19→  if (count === undefined) {
    20→    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    21→    return slug
    22→  }
    23→  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
    24→  return `${slug}-${count}`
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
    28→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29→
    30→  useEffect(() => {
    31→    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    32→
    33→    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
    34→      usedSlugs.clear()
    35→
    36→      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
    37→        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
    38→
    39→        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
    40→        if (!dom) continue
    41→
    42→        const text = dom.textContent || ''
    43→        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44→        if (!baseSlug) continue
    45→
    46→        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
    47→        dom.id = slug
    48→
    49→        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
    50→          '.rich-heading-anchor',
    51→        )
    52→        if (!anchor) {
    53→          anchor = document.createElement('a')
    54→          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
    55→          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
    56→          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
    57→          dom.prepend(anchor)
    58→        }
    59→        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
    60→      }
    61→    })
    62→  }, [editor])
    63→
    64→  return null
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { ExternalLink, Globe } from 'lucide-react'
     3→import type { ComponentType } from 'react'
     4→import { useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useLinkCardFetchContext } from './FetchContext'
     7→import { useCardFetcher } from './hooks/useCardFetcher'
     8→import { useUrlMatcher } from './hooks/useUrlMatcher'
     9→import { LinkCardSkeleton } from './LinkCardSkeleton'
    10→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from './plugins'
    11→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    12→import type { LinkCardFetchContext, PluginRegistry } from './types'
    13→
    14→export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {
    15→  source?: string
    16→  id?: string
    17→  className?: string
    18→  plugins?: PluginRegistry
    19→  fetchContext?: LinkCardFetchContext
    20→}
    21→
    22→function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    23→  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    27→      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    28→        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
    29→      ) : (
    30→        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    31→      )}
    32→    </span>
    33→  )
    34→}
    35→
    36→function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    37→  if (!classNames) return ''
    38→  return classNames
    39→    .split(/\s+/)
    40→    .filter(Boolean)
    41→    .map((cls) =>
    42→      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    43→        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    44→        : cls,
    45→    )
    46→    .join(' ')
    47→}
    48→
    49→export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    50→  props,
    51→) => {
    52→  const {
    53→    url,
    54→    title,
    55→    description,
    56→    favicon,
    57→    image,
    58→    source: explicitSource,
    59→    id: explicitId,
    60→    className,
    61→    plugins = builtinPlugins,
    62→    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
    63→  } = props
    64→
    65→  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
    66→  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue
    67→
    68→  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    69→    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    70→    [plugins],
    71→  )
    72→
    73→  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    74→    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    75→    plugins,
    76→  )
    77→  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
    78→  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
    79→  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl
    80→
    81→  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
    82→  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    83→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    84→    source,
    85→    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    86→    id: id || '',
    87→    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    88→    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    89→    context: fetchContext,
    90→  })
    91→
    92→  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
    93→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
    94→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    95→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    96→    : ''
    97→
    98→  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
    99→  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
   100→  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
   101→  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
   102→  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
   103→  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
   104→  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)
   105→
   106→  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
   107→  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)
   108→
   109→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   110→    const el = descRef.current
   111→    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
   112→      setShortDesc(false)
   113→      return
   114→    }
   115→    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
   116→    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
   117→    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
   118→    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
   119→  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])
   120→
   121→  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
   122→    return null
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
   126→    return (
   127→      <a
   128→        data-hide-print
   129→        ref={ref}
   130→        href={fullUrl}
   131→        target="_blank"
   132→        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   133→      >
   134→        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
   135→      </a>
   136→    )
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  const hasImage = !!finalImage
   140→  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage
   141→
   142→  return (
   143→    <a
   144→      data-hide-print
   145→      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
   146→      className={[
   147→        styles.card,
   148→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
   149→        typeStyleClass,
   150→        typeSemanticClass,
   151→        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
   152→        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
   153→        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
   154→        useDynamicFetch &&
   155→          (loading || isError) &&
   156→          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
   157→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
   158→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
   159→        'not-prose',
   160→        className,
   161→        mappedCardRootClass,
   162→      ]
   163→        .filter(Boolean)
   164→        .join(' ')}
   165→      data-source={source || undefined}
   166→      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
   167→      target="_blank"
   168→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
   169→      style={{
   170→        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
   171→      }}
   172→    >
   173→      {finalColor && (
   174→        <div
   175→          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
   176→          style={{
   177→            backgroundColor: finalColor,
   178→            opacity: 0.04,
   179→          }}
   180→        />
   181→      )}
   182→      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
   183→        <span
   184→          className={[
   185→            styles.image,
   186→            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
   187→            mappedImageClass,
   188→          ]
   189→            .filter(Boolean)
   190→            .join(' ')}
   191→          data-image={finalImage || ''}
   192→          style={{
   193→            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
   194→          }}
   195→        />
   196→      ) : (
   197→        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
   198→      )}
   199→      <span
   200→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
   201→      >
   202→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
   203→          <span
   204→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
   205→          >
   206→            {finalTitle}
   207→          </span>
   208→          <ExternalLink
   209→            className={`${styles.external} ${styles.semanticClassNames.external}`}
   210→            aria-hidden="true"
   211→            focusable={false}
   212→          />
   213→        </span>
   214→        {finalDesc && (
   215→          <span
   216→            ref={descRef}
   217→            className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`}
   218→          >
   219→            {finalDesc}
   220→          </span>
   221→        )}
   222→      </span>
   223→    </a>
   224→  )
   225→}
   226→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type { FC } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import * as css from './styles.css'
     5→import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'
     6→
     7→export const MermaidRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({ content }) => {
     8→  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)
     9→
    10→  if (loading) {
    11→    return <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Mermaid Loading</div>
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  if (!imgSrc) {
    15→    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <div className={css.mermaidContainer} style={{ cursor: 'default' }}>
    20→      <img src={imgSrc} alt="Mermaid diagram" width={width} height={height} />
    21→    </div>
    22→  )
    23→}
    24→
    25→export default MermaidRenderer
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export type ColorScheme = 'light' | 'dark'
     5→
     6→const ColorSchemeContext = createContext<ColorScheme>('light')
     7→
     8→export function ColorSchemeProvider({
     9→  colorScheme,
    10→  children,
    11→}: {
    12→  colorScheme: ColorScheme
    13→  children: ReactNode
    14→}) {
    15→  return (
    16→    <ColorSchemeContext.Provider value={colorScheme}>
    17→      {children}
    18→    </ColorSchemeContext.Provider>
    19→  )
    20→}
    21→
    22→export function useColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    23→  return use(ColorSchemeContext)
    24→}
    25→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
     5→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     6→  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const FootnoteDefinitionsContext =
    10→  createContext<FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue>({
    11→    definitions: {},
    12→    displayNumberMap: {},
    13→  })
    14→
    15→export function FootnoteDefinitionsProvider({
    16→  definitions,
    17→  displayNumberMap,
    18→  children,
    19→}: FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue & { children: ReactNode }) {
    20→  const value = useMemo(
    21→    () => ({ definitions, displayNumberMap }),
    22→    [definitions, displayNumberMap],
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <FootnoteDefinitionsContext value={value}>
    26→      {children}
    27→    </FootnoteDefinitionsContext>
    28→  )
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function useFootnoteDefinitions(): FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
    32→  return use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function useFootnoteContent(identifier: string): string | undefined {
    36→  const { definitions } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    37→  return definitions[identifier]
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function useFootnoteDisplayNumber(
    41→  identifier: string,
    42→): number | undefined {
    43→  const { displayNumberMap } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    44→  return displayNumberMap[identifier]
    45→}
    46→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererMode = 'editor' | 'renderer'
     8→
     9→interface RendererConfigContextValue {
    10→  config?: RendererConfig
    11→  mode: RendererMode
    12→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    13→}
    14→
    15→const RendererConfigContext = createContext<RendererConfigContextValue>({
    16→  config: undefined,
    17→  mode: 'renderer',
    18→  variant: 'article',
    19→})
    20→
    21→export interface RendererConfigProviderProps {
    22→  config?: RendererConfig
    23→  mode: RendererMode
    24→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    25→  children: ReactNode
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function RendererConfigProvider({
    29→  config,
    30→  mode,
    31→  variant,
    32→  children,
    33→}: RendererConfigProviderProps) {
    34→  const value = useMemo(
    35→    () => ({ config, mode, variant }),
    36→    [config, mode, variant],
    37→  )
    38→  return (
    39→    <RendererConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    40→      {children}
    41→    </RendererConfigContext.Provider>
    42→  )
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function useRendererConfig(): RendererConfig | undefined {
    46→  return use(RendererConfigContext).config
    47→}
    48→
    49→export function useRendererMode(): RendererMode {
    50→  return use(RendererConfigContext).mode
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function useVariant(): RichEditorVariant {
    54→  return use(RendererConfigContext).variant
    55→}
    56→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/AlertReadOnlyDecorator.tsx`

```text
     1→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     2→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     3→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     4→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     5→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     6→
     7→import type { AlertType } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
     8→import { RendererWrapper } from '../RendererWrapper'
     9→import { AlertRenderer } from './AlertRenderer'
    10→
    11→interface AlertReadOnlyDecoratorProps {
    12→  alertType: AlertType
    13→  contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function AlertReadOnlyDecorator({
    17→  alertType,
    18→  contentEditor,
    19→}: AlertReadOnlyDecoratorProps) {
    20→  return (
    21→    <>
    22→      <RendererWrapper
    23→        rendererKey="Alert"
    24→        defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer}
    25→        props={{ type: alertType }}
    26→      />
    27→      <div className="rich-alert-content">
    28→        <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
    29→          <RichTextPlugin
    30→            contentEditable={
    31→              <ContentEditable
    32→                className="rich-alert-content-editable"
    33→                style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    34→                aria-placeholder=""
    35→                placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    36→              />
    37→            }
    38→            ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    39→          />
    40→        </LexicalNestedComposer>
    41→      </div>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```
</details></tool-use>
