<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/CLAUDE.md`

```text
     1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, and integration bundles.
     8→
     9→**Build**: Vite 6 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.
    10→
    11→## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
    12→
    13→The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
    14→
    15→### Four Concepts
    16→
    17→| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
    18→|------|-------|---------|---------|
    19→| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
    20→| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
    21→| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
    22→| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
    23→
    24→### Bundle Optimization Strategy
    25→
    26→```
    27→RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
    28→├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
    29→├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
    30→│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
    31→└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
    32→```
    33→
    34→**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
    35→
    36→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
    37→
    38→### Registration
    39→
    40→| Config file | Contains | Used by |
    41→|-------------|----------|---------|
    42→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
    43→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
    44→| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
    45→| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
    46→
    47→## Package Dependency Graph
    48→
    49→```
    50→@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
    51→├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
    52→│   └── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
    53→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
    54→├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only aggregator)
    55→│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{codeblock,mermaid,image,video,gallery,alert,linkcard,...}
    56→├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
    57→│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + slash-menu + TldrawPlugin + EmbedPlugin
    58→└── @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard extension)
    59→
    60→@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
    61→@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
    62→```
    63→
    64→## Commands
    65→
    66→```bash
    67→# Build
    68→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
    69→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
    70→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
    71→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers
    72→
    73→# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
    74→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
    75→
    76→# Watch mode for core iteration
    77→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
    78→```
    79→
    80→## Core: @haklex/rich-editor
    81→
    82→Three entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./renderer` (RichRenderer).
    83→
    84→### Directory Layout
    85→
    86→- `src/nodes/` — 18 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Image, CodeBlock, KaTeX, Mermaid, Tldraw, Alert, Gallery, LinkCard, Component, Tabs, Grid, Details, Banner, Spoiler, Mention, Footnote, TaskListItem, Video)
    87→- `src/plugins/` — 16 Lexical plugins (content insertion, auto-link, drag-drop, floating toolbar, markdown shortcuts, onChange with debounce)
    88→- `src/styles/` — Vanilla Extract: 3 variants × 2 color schemes = 6 theme classes
    89→- `src/transformers/` — Markdown shortcut transformers (alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, tasklist `- [x]`)
    90→- `src/context/` — `ColorSchemeContext` (light/dark) + `RendererConfigContext` (custom renderer injection)
    91→- `src/components/renderers/` — 12 built-in default renderers
    92→
    93→### Custom Node Pattern
    94→
    95→All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:
    96→
    97→```typescript
    98→class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    99→  static importJSON(serialized) / exportJSON()
   100→  decorate() → <RendererWrapper type="Foo" props={...} />
   101→}
   102→export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
   103→export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
   104→```
   105→
   106→`RendererWrapper` delegates to custom renderer (via `RendererConfig`) or falls back to built-in default.
   107→
   108→### Node: Edit / Render Split
   109→
   110→Nodes with heavy edit UI (Popover, DropdownMenu, LexicalNestedComposer etc.) are split into two classes for tree-shaking:
   111→
   112→| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
   113→|------------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
   114→| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
   115→| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   116→| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   117→| `LinkCardNode` | `LinkCardEditNode` | `LinkCardEditDecorator` + Popover + lucide-react |
   118→| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
   119→
   120→**Base node** `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper` (or lightweight read-only decorator). No edit UI imports.
   121→
   122→**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.
   123→
   124→Config files:
   125→- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
   126→- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)
   127→
   128→**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.
   129→
   130→### Plugin Pattern
   131→
   132→```typescript
   133→export const INSERT_FOO_COMMAND = createCommand<Payload>('INSERT_FOO_COMMAND')
   134→export function FooPlugin() {
   135→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   136→  useEffect(() => editor.registerCommand(INSERT_FOO_COMMAND, handler, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR), [editor])
   137→  return null
   138→}
   139→```
   140→
   141→## Variant System
   142→
   143→Controlled by `variant` prop + `ColorSchemeContext`. Theme CSS variables in `src/styles/vars.css.ts` via `createThemeContract`.
   144→
   145→| Variant | Font | Size | Line-height | Max-width | Use case |
   146→|---------|------|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
   147→| article | system sans-serif | 16px | 1.75 | 65ch | Blog posts |
   148→| note | CJK serif (Noto Serif CJK SC) | 16px | 1.8 | 65ch | Personal notes |
   149→| comment | system sans-serif | 14px | 1.5 | none | Inline comments |
   150→
   151→## Renderer Config (Custom Renderer Injection)
   152→
   153→```typescript
   154→interface RendererConfig {
   155→  Alert?, CodeBlock?, Component?, Footnote?, Gallery?,
   156→  Image?, KaTeX?, LinkCard?, Mermaid?, Mention?, Tabs?, Video?
   157→}
   158→<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
   159→<RichRenderer rendererConfig={...} />
   160→```
   161→
   162→## Individual Renderer Packages
   163→
   164→`@haklex/rich-renderer-*` packages provide feature-specific renderers with heavy dependencies isolated:
   165→- `codeblock` — Shiki syntax highlighting
   166→- `mermaid` — Mermaid diagram rendering
   167→- `image` — Blurhash, captions, accent colors
   168→- `video` — Responsive video players
   169→- `gallery` — Image grid with lightbox
   170→- `alert` — GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
   171→- `linkcard` — Link preview cards
   172→- `mention` — Social platform mention badges
   173→
   174→`@haklex/rich-renderers` aggregates all, with sub-path exports: `./codeblock`, `./mermaid`, etc.
   175→
   176→### Renderer: Edit / Static Split
   177→
   178→Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:
   179→
   180→| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
   181→|---------|----------------------|---------------------|-----------------|
   182→| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   183→| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   184→| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |
   185→
   186→Packages without edit-specific heavy deps (`codeblock`, `image`, `video`, `gallery`, `linkcard`) do not need splitting.
   187→
   188→Aggregator packages:
   189→- `@haklex/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
   190→- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Depends on `@haklex/rich-renderers` for `enhancedRendererConfig` spread. Also re-exports edit nodes (`embedEditNodes`, `tabsEditNodes`), plugins (`EmbedPlugin`, `TldrawPlugin`, `SlashMenuPlugin`), and slash-menu utilities.
   191→
   192→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable` prop), splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.
   193→
   194→**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export both from `index.ts`. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`.
   195→
   196→## Integration: @haklex/rich-kit-shiro
   197→
   198→Production bundle for the web app. Combines core + all renderers + tldraw + slash menu.
   199→
   200→```typescript
   201→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
   202→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor'   // → enhancedEditRendererConfig
   203→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer' // → enhancedRendererConfig
   204→```
   205→
   206→`ShiroEditor` uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers). `ShiroRenderer` uses `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers). This ensures the renderer entry tree-shakes all edit UI deps (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react edit icons).
   207→
   208→## Tldraw Integration (@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw)
   209→
   210→`TldrawNode` (DecoratorNode) stores tldraw snapshot as JSON string. Renderer lazy-loaded via `React.lazy()` with Suspense.
   211→
   212→## Diff Viewer (@haklex/rich-diff)
   213→
   214→```typescript
   215→<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />
   216→```
   217→
   218→Compares two `SerializedEditorState` at node level. Side-by-side layout with insert/delete highlighting.
   219→
   220→## Build Configuration
   221→
   222→Each package uses the same Vite pattern:
   223→
   224→- `BUILD_LIB=1` triggers library mode build
   225→- Vanilla Extract plugin for CSS-in-TS → static CSS (zero runtime)
   226→- All React, Lexical, and peer deps externalized
   227→- Output: ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` declarations
   228→- Target: ES2020
   229→
   230→## Styling
   231→
   232→Vanilla Extract (`*.css.ts` files) throughout. No Tailwind in editor packages. Theme contract defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, typography, and border-radius. Each variant+colorScheme combination produces a class name applied to the editor root.
   233→
   234→### Neutral colors
   235→
   236→Use a **neutral** (gray) color palette for secondary/muted text, borders, section labels, and descriptions—e.g. `#737373` / `#a3a3a3` (Tailwind neutral-500/400). Avoid tinted grays (slate, zinc, blue-gray) unless a design explicitly requires them. This keeps UI elements like slash menu sections and descriptions hue-neutral.
   237→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import {
     2→  Info,
     3→  Lightbulb,
     4→  MessageSquareWarning,
     5→  OctagonAlert,
     6→  TriangleAlert,
     7→} from 'lucide-react'
     8→import type { FC } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import type { AlertType } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    11→import { ALERT_LABELS } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    12→
    13→export interface AlertRendererProps {
    14→  type: AlertType
    15→  editable?: boolean
    16→  onTypeChange?: (type: AlertType) => void
    17→}
    18→
    19→const InfoIcon = () => <Info size={16} />
    20→const LightbulbIcon = () => <Lightbulb size={16} />
    21→const MessageWarningIcon = () => <MessageSquareWarning size={16} />
    22→const TriangleAlertIcon = () => <TriangleAlert size={16} />
    23→const OctagonAlertIcon = () => <OctagonAlert size={16} />
    24→
    25→const ALERT_ICONS: Record<AlertType, FC> = {
    26→  note: InfoIcon,
    27→  tip: LightbulbIcon,
    28→  important: MessageWarningIcon,
    29→  warning: TriangleAlertIcon,
    30→  caution: OctagonAlertIcon,
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const AlertRenderer: FC<AlertRendererProps> = ({ type }) => {
    34→  const Icon = ALERT_ICONS[type]
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className={`rich-alert-header rich-alert-header-${type}`}>
    38→      <span className="rich-alert-icon">
    39→        <Icon />
    40→      </span>
    41→      <span className="rich-alert-label">{ALERT_LABELS[type]}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→

     1→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     2→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     3→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     4→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     5→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     6→
     7→import type { BannerType } from '../../nodes/BannerNode'
     8→import { RendererWrapper } from '../RendererWrapper'
     9→import { BannerRenderer } from './BannerRenderer'
    10→
    11→interface BannerReadOnlyDecoratorProps {
    12→  bannerType: BannerType
    13→  contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function BannerReadOnlyDecorator({
    17→  bannerType,
    18→  contentEditor,
    19→}: BannerReadOnlyDecoratorProps) {
    20→  return (
    21→    <div className="rich-banner-inner">
    22→      <RendererWrapper
    23→        rendererKey="Banner"
    24→        defaultRenderer={BannerRenderer}
    25→        props={{ type: bannerType }}
    26→      />
    27→      <div className="rich-banner-content">
    28→        <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
    29→          <RichTextPlugin
    30→            contentEditable={
    31→              <ContentEditable
    32→                className="rich-banner-content-editable"
    33→                style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    34→                aria-placeholder=""
    35→                placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    36→              />
    37→            }
    38→            ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    39→          />
    40→        </LexicalNestedComposer>
    41→      </div>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useColorScheme } from '../../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     4→import { useVariant } from '../../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { CodeToHtmlFn } from '../../utils/shiki'
     6→import { loadCodeToHtml } from '../../utils/shiki'
     7→
     8→export interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
     9→  code: string
    10→  language: string
    11→  showLineNumbers?: boolean
    12→  editable?: boolean
    13→  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function CodeBlockRenderer({
    17→  code,
    18→  language,
    19→  showLineNumbers: showLineNumbersProp,
    20→}: CodeBlockRendererProps) {
    21→  const variant = useVariant()
    22→  const showLineNumbers = showLineNumbersProp ?? variant !== 'comment'
    23→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    24→  const shikiTheme = colorScheme === 'dark' ? 'github-dark' : 'github-light'
    25→  const [highlightedHtml, setHighlightedHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    26→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
    27→  const copyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    28→
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    let cancelled = false
    31→    setHighlightedHtml(null)
    32→
    33→    loadCodeToHtml()
    34→      .then((toHtml: CodeToHtmlFn) =>
    35→        toHtml(code, {
    36→          lang: language,
    37→          theme: shikiTheme,
    38→        }),
    39→      )
    40→      .then((html: string) => {
    41→        if (!cancelled) {
    42→          setHighlightedHtml(html)
    43→        }
    44→      })
    45→      .catch(() => {
    46→        if (!cancelled) {
    47→          setHighlightedHtml(null)
    48→        }
    49→      })
    50→
    51→    return () => {
    52→      cancelled = true
    53→    }
    54→  }, [code, language, shikiTheme])
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    return () => clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleCopy = useCallback(() => {
    61→    navigator.clipboard
    62→      .writeText(code)
    63→      .then(() => {
    64→        setCopied(true)
    65→        clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    66→        copyTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
    67→      })
    68→      .catch(() => {})
    69→  }, [code])
    70→
    71→  const header = language ? (
    72→    <div className="rich-code-block-header">
    73→      <span className="rich-code-block-lang">{language}</span>
    74→      <button
    75→        type="button"
    76→        className="rich-code-block-copy"
    77→        onClick={handleCopy}
    78→        aria-label={copied ? 'Copied to clipboard' : 'Copy code'}
    79→      >
    80→        {copied ? 'Copied' : 'Copy'}
    81→      </button>
    82→    </div>
    83→  ) : null
    84→
    85→  const wrapperClass = showLineNumbers
    86→    ? 'rich-code-block rich-code-block-numbered'
    87→    : 'rich-code-block'
    88→
    89→  if (highlightedHtml) {
    90→    return (
    91→      <div className={wrapperClass}>
    92→        {header}
    93→        <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: highlightedHtml }} />
    94→      </div>
    95→    )
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  const lines = code.split('\n')
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className={wrapperClass}>
   101→      {header}
   102→      <pre>
   103→        <code>
   104→          {lines.map((line, i) => (
   105→            <span key={i} className="line">
   106→              {line}
   107→              {i < lines.length - 1 ? '\n' : ''}
   108→            </span>
   109→          ))}
   110→        </code>
   111→      </pre>
   112→    </div>
   113→  )
   114→}
   115→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import {
     2→  TooltipContent,
     3→  TooltipRoot,
     4→  TooltipTrigger,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6→import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import {
    10→  useFootnoteContent,
    11→  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12→} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13→
    14→export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15→  identifier: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19→  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20→  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21→
    22→  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24→
    25→  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27→      const target =
    28→        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29→        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30→      if (!target) return
    31→
    32→      e.preventDefault()
    33→      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34→      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35→
    36→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37→        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38→      }, 1200)
    39→    },
    40→    [identifier, targetId],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47→      <TooltipRoot>
    48→        <TooltipTrigger
    49→          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50→            <a
    51→              {...props}
    52→              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53→              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54→              id={referenceId}
    55→              role="doc-noteref"
    56→              aria-label={
    57→                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58→              }
    59→              onClick={handleClick}
    60→              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61→            >
    62→              {label}
    63→            </a>
    64→          )}
    65→        />
    66→        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67→      </TooltipRoot>
    68→    </span>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteSectionEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $nodesOfType } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6→import { FootnoteSectionNode } from '../../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
     7→
     8→export interface FootnoteSectionEditRendererProps {
     9→  definitions: Record<string, string>
    10→  nodeKey: string
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function FootnoteSectionEditRenderer({
    14→  definitions,
    15→}: FootnoteSectionEditRendererProps) {
    16→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    17→  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    18→
    19→  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    20→    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    21→  )
    22→
    23→  const handleContentChange = useCallback(
    24→    (identifier: string, newContent: string) => {
    25→      editor.update(() => {
    26→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    27→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    28→          sectionNodes[0].setDefinition(identifier, newContent)
    29→        }
    30→      })
    31→    },
    32→    [editor],
    33→  )
    34→
    35→  const handleRemove = useCallback(
    36→    (identifier: string) => {
    37→      editor.update(() => {
    38→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    39→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    40→          sectionNodes[0].removeDefinition(identifier)
    41→        }
    42→      })
    43→    },
    44→    [editor],
    45→  )
    46→
    47→  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    48→
    49→  return (
    50→    <div
    51→      className="rich-footnote-section-content rich-footnote-section-edit"
    52→      role="doc-endnotes"
    53→    >
    54→      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    55→      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    56→        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    57→          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    58→          return (
    59→            <li
    60→              key={identifier}
    61→              id={`footnote-${identifier}`}
    62→              className="rich-footnote-section-item rich-footnote-section-item-edit"
    63→            >
    64→              <span className="rich-footnote-section-item-num">
    65→                {displayNum}.
    66→              </span>
    67→              <input
    68→                type="text"
    69→                className="rich-footnote-section-item-input"
    70→                value={content}
    71→                onChange={(e) =>
    72→                  handleContentChange(identifier, e.target.value)
    73→                }
    74→                placeholder={`Footnote content for [^${identifier}]`}
    75→              />
    76→              <button
    77→                type="button"
    78→                className="rich-footnote-section-item-remove"
    79→                onClick={() => handleRemove(identifier)}
    80→                aria-label={`Remove footnote ${identifier}`}
    81→              >
    82→                ×
    83→              </button>
    84→            </li>
    85→          )
    86→        })}
    87→      </ol>

```text
     1→import type { MouseEvent } from 'react'
     2→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     5→
     6→export interface FootnoteSectionRendererProps {
     7→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     8→  nodeKey: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12→  definitions,
    13→}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14→  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15→
    16→  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17→    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18→  )
    19→
    20→  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21→
    22→  return (
    23→    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24→      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25→      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26→        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27→          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28→          return (
    29→            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30→              key={identifier}
    31→              identifier={identifier}
    32→              content={content}
    33→              displayNum={displayNum}
    34→            />
    35→          )
    36→        })}
    37→      </ol>
    38→    </div>
    39→  )
    40→}
    41→
    42→function FootnoteSectionItem({
    43→  identifier,
    44→  content,
    45→  displayNum,
    46→}: {
    47→  identifier: string
    48→  content: string
    49→  displayNum: number | string
    50→}) {
    51→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    52→  const refId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    53→
    54→  const handleBackClick = useCallback(
    55→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56→      e.preventDefault()
    57→      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58→      if (!refElement) return
    59→      refElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    60→      refElement.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    61→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    62→        refElement.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    63→      }, 1200)
    64→    },
    65→    [refId],
    66→  )
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <li
    70→      id={targetId}
    71→      className="rich-footnote-section-item"
    72→      value={typeof displayNum === 'number' ? displayNum : undefined}
    73→    >
    74→      <span className="rich-footnote-section-item-content">{content}</span>
    75→      <a
    76→        href={`#${refId}`}
    77→        onClick={handleBackClick}
    78→        className="rich-footnote-back-ref"
    79→        role="doc-backlink"
    80→        aria-label={`Back to reference ${displayNum}`}
    81→      >
    82→        ↩
    83→      </a>
    84→    </li>
    85→  )
    86→}
    87→
```

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { decodeThumbHash } from '../../utils/thumbhash'
     4→
     5→export interface ImageRendererProps {
     6→  src: string
     7→  altText: string
     8→  width?: number
     9→  height?: number
    10→  caption?: string
    11→  thumbhash?: string
    12→  accent?: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export function ImageRenderer({
    16→  src,
    17→  altText,
    18→  width,
    19→  height,
    20→  caption,
    21→  thumbhash,
    22→  accent,
    23→}: ImageRendererProps) {
    24→  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(false)
    25→  const [zoomed, setZoomed] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  const handleLoad = useCallback(() => setLoaded(true), [])
    28→
    29→  const handleZoomOpen = useCallback(() => {
    30→    if (!loaded) return
    31→    setZoomed(true)
    32→  }, [loaded])
    33→
    34→  const handleZoomClose = useCallback(() => setZoomed(false), [])
    35→
    36→  useEffect(() => {
    37→    if (!zoomed) return
    38→    const onKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    39→      if (e.key === 'Escape') setZoomed(false)
    40→    }
    41→    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    42→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    43→  }, [zoomed])
    44→
    45→  useEffect(() => {
    46→    if (!zoomed) return
    47→    const prev = document.body.style.overflow
    48→    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    49→    return () => {
    50→      document.body.style.overflow = prev
    51→    }
    52→  }, [zoomed])
    53→
    54→  const handleContainerKeyDown = useCallback(
    55→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    56→      if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && loaded) {
    57→        e.preventDefault()
    58→        setZoomed(true)
    59→      }
    60→    },
    61→    [loaded],
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    65→    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    66→    [thumbhash],
    67→  )
    68→
    69→  const aspectStyle: React.CSSProperties =
    70→    width && height
    71→      ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}`, maxWidth: '100%', width }
    72→      : { maxWidth: '100%' }
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <figure className="rich-image">
    76→      <div
    77→        className={`rich-image-container${loaded ? ' rich-image-loaded' : ''}`}
    78→        style={{
    79→          ...aspectStyle,
    80→          backgroundColor: !loaded && !placeholderUrl ? accent : undefined,
    81→          backgroundImage:
    82→            !loaded && placeholderUrl ? `url(${placeholderUrl})` : undefined,
    83→          backgroundSize: 'cover',
    84→          cursor: loaded ? 'zoom-in' : undefined,
    85→        }}
    86→        onClick={handleZoomOpen}
    87→        onKeyDown={handleContainerKeyDown}
    88→        role="button"
    89→        tabIndex={loaded ? 0 : -1}
    90→        aria-label={loaded ? `Zoom image: ${altText}` : undefined}
    91→      >
    92→        <img
    93→          src={src}
    94→          alt={altText}
    95→          width={width}
    96→          height={height}
    97→          loading="lazy"
    98→          onLoad={handleLoad}
    99→          style={{ maxWidth: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
   100→          className={loaded ? 'rich-image-visible' : 'rich-image-hidden'}
   101→        />
   102→      </div>
   103→      {caption && <figcaption>{caption}</figcaption>}
   104→
   105→      {zoomed && (
   106→        <div
   107→          className="rich-image-zoom-overlay"
   108→          onClick={handleZoomClose}
   109→          role="dialog"
   110→          aria-modal="true"
   111→          aria-label={`Zoomed image: ${altText}`}
   112→          tabIndex={0}
   113→        >
   114→          <img src={src} alt={altText} className="rich-image-zoom-img" />
   115→        </div>
   116→      )}
   117→    </figure>
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/KaTeXRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export interface KaTeXRendererProps {
     4→  equation: string
     5→  displayMode: boolean
     6→}
     7→
     8→type KaTeXModule = {
     9→  default: {
    10→    renderToString: (
    11→      eq: string,
    12→      opts: { displayMode: boolean; throwOnError: boolean },
    13→    ) => string
    14→  }
    15→}
    16→let katexModule: KaTeXModule | null = null
    17→let katexLoadPromise: Promise<KaTeXModule> | null = null
    18→
    19→function loadKaTeX(): Promise<KaTeXModule> {
    20→  if (katexModule) return Promise.resolve(katexModule)
    21→  if (!katexLoadPromise) {
    22→    katexLoadPromise = import('katex').then((mod) => {
    23→      katexModule = mod as unknown as KaTeXModule
    24→      return katexModule
    25→    })
    26→  }
    27→  return katexLoadPromise
    28→}
    29→
    30→export function KaTeXRenderer({ equation, displayMode }: KaTeXRendererProps) {
    31→  const [html, setHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    32→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    let cancelled = false
    36→
    37→    loadKaTeX()
    38→      .then((katex) => {
    39→        if (cancelled) return
    40→        const rendered = katex.default.renderToString(equation, {
    41→          displayMode,
    42→          throwOnError: false,
    43→        })
    44→        setHtml(rendered)
    45→        setError(null)
    46→      })
    47→      .catch(() => {
    48→        if (cancelled) return
    49→        setHtml(null)
    50→        setError('KaTeX is not available')
    51→      })
    52→
    53→    return () => {
    54→      cancelled = true
    55→    }
    56→  }, [equation, displayMode])
    57→
    58→  if (error) {
    59→    return <code className="rich-katex-fallback">{equation}</code>
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  if (html) {
    63→    return (
    64→      <span
    65→        className={displayMode ? 'rich-katex-block' : 'rich-katex-inline'}
    66→        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }}
    67→      />
    68→    )
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  return <code className="rich-katex-fallback">{equation}</code>
    72→}
    73→
```
</details></tool-use>

## 1. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/alert.ts`

```ts
import { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

import {
  $createAlertQuoteNode,
  AlertQuoteNode,
  type AlertType,
} from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'

const ALERT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, AlertType> = {
  NOTE: 'note',
  TIP: 'tip',
  IMPORTANT: 'important',
  WARNING: 'warning',
  CAUTION: 'caution',
}

export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [AlertQuoteNode],
  regExp: /^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|IMPORTANT|WARNING|CAUTION)\]\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const typeKey = match[1]
    const alertType = ALERT_TYPE_MAP[typeKey] || 'note'

    const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)

    const serializedChildren = children.map((child) => child.exportJSON())
    const content = {
      root: {
        children: [
          {
            type: 'paragraph',
            children: serializedChildren,
            direction: null,
            format: '',
            indent: 0,
            textFormat: 0,
            textStyle: '',
            version: 1,
          },
        ],
        direction: null,
        format: '',
        indent: 0,
        type: 'root',
        version: 1,
      },
    } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

    const editorState = alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)

    parentNode.replace(alertNode)
  },
}
```

---

## 2. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`

```ts
import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'

import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'

const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
  note: 'note',
  info: 'note',
  tip: 'tip',
  success: 'tip',
  important: 'important',
  warning: 'warning',
  warn: 'warning',
  error: 'caution',
  danger: 'caution',
  caution: 'caution',
}

export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const type = match[1]
    const params = match[2]

    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]
      const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)

      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
        child.exportJSON(),
      )
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: [
            {
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: serializedChildren,
              direction: null,
              format: '',
              indent: 0,
              textFormat: 0,
              textStyle: '',
              version: 1,
            },
          ],
          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,
          type: 'root',
          version: 1,
        },
      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

      const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
      banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)

      parentNode.replace(banner)
      return
    }

    if (type === 'details') {
      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'

      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)

      children.forEach((child) => {
        details.append(child)
      })

      parentNode.replace(details)
      return
    }

    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    children.forEach((child) => {
      paragraph.append(child)
    })
    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
  },
}
```

---

## 3. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/grid-container.ts`

```ts
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import { $getRoot, type LexicalNode } from 'lexical'

import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'

function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
}

export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  dependencies: [],
  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    const cells = node.getCellEditors().map((editor) =>
      editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
        return $getRoot().getTextContent()
      }),
    )
    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
  },
  regExp: /a^/,
  replace: () => {},
  type: 'element',
}
```

---

## 4. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/AlertPlugin.tsx`

```tsx
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

import type { AlertType } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
import { $createAlertQuoteNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'

export const INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND = createCommand<AlertType>('INSERT_ALERT')

export function AlertPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerCommand(
      INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND,
      (alertType) => {
        $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)])
        return true
      },
      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    )
  }, [editor])

  return null
}
```

---

```tsx
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType, $parseSerializedNode } from 'lexical'
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
import { FootnoteSectionNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'

export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    Record<string, number>
  >({})
  const pendingUpdateRef = useRef(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
      editorState.read(() => {
        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
        const seen = new Set<string>()
        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
        let counter = 1
        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
          const id = node.getIdentifier()
          if (!seen.has(id)) {
            seen.add(id)
            numberMap[id] = counter++
          }
        }
        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)

        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)

        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
        } else {
          setDefinitions({})
        }

        if (!editor.isEditable() || pendingUpdateRef.current) return

        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
          queueMicrotask(() => {
            editor.update(() => {
              const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
              for (const s of sections) s.remove()
            })
            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
          })
          return
        }

        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
          const seenSnapshot = [...seen]
          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
          queueMicrotask(() => {
            editor.update(() => {
              const root = $getRoot()
              const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
              for (const id of seenSnapshot) {
                defs[id] = ''
              }
              const section = $parseSerializedNode({
                type: 'footnote-section',
                definitions: defs,
                version: 1,
              })
              root.append(section)
            })
            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
          })
        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
          const orphanIds = Object.keys(existingDefs).filter(
            (id) => !seen.has(id),
          )
          if (missingIds.length > 0 || orphanIds.length > 0) {
            pendingUpdateRef.current = true
            queueMicrotask(() => {
              editor.update(() => {
                const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
                if (freshSections.length > 0) {
                  for (const id of missingIds) {
                    freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
                  }
                  for (const id of orphanIds) {
                    freshSections[0].removeDefinition(id)
                  }
                }
              })
              pendingUpdateRef.current = false
            })
          }
        }
      })
    })
  }, [editor])

  return (
    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
      definitions={definitions}
      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
    >
      {children}
    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
  )
}
```

## 6. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx`

```tsx
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { HeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

function textToSlug(text: string): string {
  return (
    text
      .toLowerCase()
      .trim()
      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
  )
}

function deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
  if (count === undefined) {
    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    return slug
  }
  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
  return `${slug}-${count}`
}

export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()

    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
      usedSlugs.clear()

      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue

        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
        if (!dom) continue

        const text = dom.textContent || ''
        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
        if (!baseSlug) continue

        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
        dom.id = slug

        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
          '.rich-heading-anchor',
        )
        if (!anchor) {
          anchor = document.createElement('a')
          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
          dom.prepend(anchor)
        }
        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
      }
    })
  }, [editor])

  return null
}
```

## 7. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

```tsx
import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { ExternalLink, Globe } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ComponentType } from 'react'
import { useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { useLinkCardFetchContext } from './FetchContext'
import { useCardFetcher } from './hooks/useCardFetcher'
import { useUrlMatcher } from './hooks/useUrlMatcher'
import { LinkCardSkeleton } from './LinkCardSkeleton'
import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from './plugins'
import * as styles from './styles.css'
import type { LinkCardFetchContext, PluginRegistry } from './types'

export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {
  source?: string
  id?: string
  className?: string
  plugins?: PluginRegistry
  fetchContext?: LinkCardFetchContext
}

function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)

  return (
    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
      ) : (
        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
      )}
    </span>
  )
}

function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
  if (!classNames) return ''
  return classNames
    .split(/\s+/)
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((cls) =>
      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
        : cls,
    )
    .join(' ')
}

export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
  props,
) => {
  const {
    url,
    title,
    description,
    favicon,
    image,
    source: explicitSource,
    id: explicitId,
    className,
    plugins = builtinPlugins,
    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
  } = props

  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue

  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    [plugins],
  )

  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    plugins,
  )
  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl

  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    source,
    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    id: id || '',
    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    context: fetchContext,
  })

  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    : ''

  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)

  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    const el = descRef.current
    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
      setShortDesc(false)
      return
    }
    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])

  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
    return null
  }

  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
    return (
      <a
        data-hide-print
        ref={ref}
        href={fullUrl}
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer"
      >
        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
      </a>
    )
  }

  const hasImage = !!finalImage
  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage

  return (
    <a
      data-hide-print
      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
      className={[
        styles.card,
        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
        typeStyleClass,
        typeSemanticClass,
        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
        useDynamicFetch &&
          (loading || isError) &&
          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
        'not-prose',
        className,
        mappedCardRootClass,
      ]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join(' ')}
      data-source={source || undefined}
      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
      target="_blank"
      rel="noopener noreferrer"
      style={{
        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
      }}
    >
      {finalColor && (
        <div
          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
          style={{
            backgroundColor: finalColor,
            opacity: 0.04,
          }}
        />
      )}
      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
        <span
          className={[
            styles.image,
            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
            mappedImageClass,
          ]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(' ')}
          data-image={finalImage || ''}
          style={{
            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
          }}
        />
      ) : (
        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
      )}
      <span
        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
      >
        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
          <span
            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
          >
            {finalTitle}
          </span>
          <ExternalLink
            className={`${styles.external} ${styles.semanticClassNames.external}`}
            aria-hidden="true"
            focusable={false}
          />
        </span>
        {finalDesc && (
          <span
            ref={descRef}
            className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`}
          >
            {finalDesc}
          </span>
        )}
      </span>
    </a>
  )
}
```

## 8. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidRenderer.tsx`

```tsx
import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'

export const MermaidRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)

  if (loading) {
    return <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Mermaid Loading</div>
  }

  if (!imgSrc) {
    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
  }

  return (
    <div className={css.mermaidContainer} style={{ cursor: 'default' }}>
      <img src={imgSrc} alt="Mermaid diagram" width={width} height={height} />
    </div>
  )
}

export default MermaidRenderer
```

import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use } from 'react'

export type ColorScheme = 'light' | 'dark'

const ColorSchemeContext = createContext<ColorScheme>('light')

export function ColorSchemeProvider({
  colorScheme,
  children,
}: {
  colorScheme: ColorScheme
  children: ReactNode
}) {
  return (
    <ColorSchemeContext.Provider value={colorScheme}>
      {children}
    </ColorSchemeContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function useColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
  return use(ColorSchemeContext)
}

### 9b. `FootnoteDefinitionsContext.tsx`

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

export interface FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
  definitions: Record<string, string>
  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
}

const FootnoteDefinitionsContext =
  createContext<FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue>({
    definitions: {},
    displayNumberMap: {},
  })

export function FootnoteDefinitionsProvider({
  definitions,
  displayNumberMap,
  children,
}: FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue & { children: ReactNode }) {
  const value = useMemo(
    () => ({ definitions, displayNumberMap }),
    [definitions, displayNumberMap],
  )
  return (
    <FootnoteDefinitionsContext value={value}>
      {children}
    </FootnoteDefinitionsContext>
  )
}

export function useFootnoteDefinitions(): FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
  return use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
}

export function useFootnoteContent(identifier: string): string | undefined {
  const { definitions } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
  return definitions[identifier]
}

export function useFootnoteDisplayNumber(
  identifier: string,
): number | undefined {
  const { displayNumberMap } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
  return displayNumberMap[identifier]
}
```

import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'

export type RendererMode = 'editor' | 'renderer'

interface RendererConfigContextValue {
  config?: RendererConfig
  mode: RendererMode
  variant: RichEditorVariant
}

const RendererConfigContext = createContext<RendererConfigContextValue>({
  config: undefined,
  mode: 'renderer',
  variant: 'article',
})

export interface RendererConfigProviderProps {
  config?: RendererConfig
  mode: RendererMode
  variant: RichEditorVariant
  children: ReactNode
}

export function RendererConfigProvider({
  config,
  mode,
  variant,
  children,
}: RendererConfigProviderProps) {
  const value = useMemo(
    () => ({ config, mode, variant }),
    [config, mode, variant],
  )
  return (
    <RendererConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
      {children}
    </RendererConfigContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function useRendererConfig(): RendererConfig | undefined {
  return use(RendererConfigContext).config
}

export function useRendererMode(): RendererMode {
  return use(RendererConfigContext).mode
}

export function useVariant(): RichEditorVariant {
  return use(RendererConfigContext).variant
}
```

| File | Lines |

Full contents of each were provided above in the read results. Here is a summary of each:

- **AlertReadOnlyDecorator.tsx** -- Read-only decorator for alert quotes using `LexicalNestedComposer` + `RendererWrapper` delegating to `AlertRenderer`.
- **AlertRenderer.tsx** -- Displays alert header with icon (from `lucide-react`) and label, supporting note/tip/important/warning/caution types.
- **BannerReadOnlyDecorator.tsx** -- Read-only decorator for banner nodes using `LexicalNestedComposer` + `RendererWrapper` delegating to `BannerRenderer`.
- **BannerRenderer.tsx** -- Minimal banner icon renderer with CSS class based on type.
- **CodeBlockRenderer.tsx** -- Code block with Shiki syntax highlighting (lazy-loaded), copy button, line numbers, and light/dark theme support.
- **FootnoteRenderer.tsx** -- Inline footnote reference with tooltip (via `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`), smooth-scroll navigation, and display number mapping.
- **FootnoteSectionEditRenderer.tsx** -- Editable footnote section with input fields for definitions, remove buttons, and Lexical editor integration.
- **FootnoteSectionRenderer.tsx** -- Read-only footnote section with back-reference links and smooth-scroll navigation.
- **GridReadOnlyDecorator.tsx** -- Read-only CSS grid layout using `LexicalNestedComposer` for each cell editor.
- **ImageRenderer.tsx** -- Image with thumbhash placeholder, accent color background, zoom overlay, and caption support.
- **KaTeXRenderer.tsx** -- LaTeX math renderer with lazy-loaded KaTeX module, supporting both inline and display modes.
- **LinkCardRenderer.tsx** -- Simple link card with optional image, favicon, title, description, and URL display.
- **MentionRenderer.tsx** -- Plain mention badge showing `@handle`.
- **MermaidRenderer.tsx** -- Fallback mermaid renderer showing raw content in a `<pre>` block.
- **VideoRenderer.tsx** -- HTML5 video player with poster, dimensions, and controls.

## 1. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`

```typescript
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedEditorState,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import {
  Info,
  Lightbulb,
  TriangleAlert as TriangleAlertIcon,
} from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { AlertReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/AlertReadOnlyDecorator'
import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'

export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'

export const ALERT_TYPES: AlertType[] = [
  'note',
  'tip',
  'important',
  'warning',
  'caution',
]

export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {
  note: 'Note',
  tip: 'Tip',
  important: 'Important',
  warning: 'Warning',
  caution: 'Caution',
}

function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
  return createEditor({
    namespace: 'AlertContent',
    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    theme: editorTheme,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[AlertContent]', error)
    },
  })
}

export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
  {
    alertType: AlertType
    content: SerializedEditorState
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __alertType: AlertType
  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Callout',
      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Info callout block',
      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
      section: 'ADVANCED',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
        })
      },
    },
    {
      title: 'Tip',
      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
      section: 'ADVANCED',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
        })
      },
    },
    {
      title: 'Warning',
      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Warn about something',
      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
      section: 'ADVANCED',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'alert-quote'
  }

  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
    return new AlertQuoteNode(
      node.__alertType,
      node.__contentEditor,
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  constructor(
    alertType: AlertType,
    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
    key?: NodeKey,
  ) {
    super(key)
    this.__alertType = alertType
    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
    }
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  getAlertType(): AlertType {
    return this.__alertType
  }

  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__alertType = alertType
  }

  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    return this.__contentEditor
  }

  getTextContent(): string {
    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
    })
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
    if (serializedNode.content) {
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
        serializedNode.content,
      )
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    }
    return node
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'alert-quote',
      alertType: this.__alertType,
      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
      alertType: this.__alertType,
      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    })
  }
}

export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
}

export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is AlertQuoteNode {
  return node instanceof AlertQuoteNode
}
```

import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { AlertEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/AlertEditDecorator'
import { AlertQuoteNode, type SerializedAlertQuoteNode } from './AlertQuoteNode'

export class AlertQuoteEditNode extends AlertQuoteNode {
  static clone(node: AlertQuoteEditNode): AlertQuoteEditNode {
    return new AlertQuoteEditNode(
      node.__alertType,
      node.__contentEditor,
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  static importJSON(
    serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode,
  ): AlertQuoteEditNode {
    const node = new AlertQuoteEditNode(serializedNode.alertType)
    if (serializedNode.content) {
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
        serializedNode.content,
      )
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    }
    return node
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(AlertEditDecorator, {
      nodeKey: this.__key,
      alertType: this.__alertType,
      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    })
  }
}

```typescript
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedEditorState,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'

export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'

const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
  info: 'note',
  success: 'tip',
  error: 'caution',
}

export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
}

export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
  'note',
  'tip',
  'important',
  'warning',
  'caution',
]

export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
  note: 'Note',
  tip: 'Tip',
  important: 'Important',
  warning: 'Warning',
  caution: 'Caution',
}

function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
  return createEditor({
    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    theme: editorTheme,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    },
  })
}

export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
  {
    bannerType: BannerType
    content: SerializedEditorState
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
}

export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __bannerType: BannerType
  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Banner',
      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
      section: 'ADVANCED',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'banner'
  }

  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(
    bannerType: BannerType,
    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
    key?: NodeKey,
  ) {
    super(key)
    this.__bannerType = bannerType
    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
    }
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  getBannerType(): BannerType {
    return this.__bannerType
  }

  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
  }

  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    return this.__contentEditor
  }

  getTextContent(): string {
    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
    })
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)

    if (serializedNode.content) {
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
        serializedNode.content,
      )
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    } else if (legacy.children) {
      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: legacy.children,
          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,
          type: 'root',
          version: 1,
        },
      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    }

    return node
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'banner',
      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {
      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    })
  }
}

export function $createBannerNode(bannerType: BannerType): BannerNode {
  return new BannerNode(bannerType)
}

export function $isBannerNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is BannerNode {
  return node instanceof BannerNode
}
```

---

```typescript
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  SerializedEditorState,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
} from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { BannerEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/BannerEditDecorator'
import {
  BannerNode,
  normalizeBannerType,
  type SerializedBannerNode,
} from './BannerNode'

interface LegacySerializedBannerEditNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
}

export class BannerEditNode extends BannerNode {
  static clone(node: BannerEditNode): BannerEditNode {
    return new BannerEditNode(
      node.__bannerType,
      node.__contentEditor,
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerEditNode {
    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerEditNode
    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
    const node = new BannerEditNode(bannerType)

    if (serializedNode.content) {
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
        serializedNode.content,
      )
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    } else if (legacy.children) {
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: legacy.children,
          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,
          type: 'root',
          version: 1,
        },
      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    }

    return node
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(BannerEditDecorator, {
      nodeKey: this.__key,
      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    })
  }
}
