## 19. `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/CLAUDE.md`

This is a lengthy documentation file. Full contents:

```markdown
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Overview

Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, and integration bundles.

**Build**: Vite 6 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.

## Terminology: Static / Edit Split

The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.

### Four Concepts

| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
|------|-------|---------|---------|
| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |

### Bundle Optimization Strategy

```
RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
```

**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.

**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.

### Registration

| Config file | Contains | Used by |
|-------------|----------|---------|
| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |

## Package Dependency Graph

```
@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
│   └── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only aggregator)
│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{codeblock,mermaid,image,video,gallery,alert,linkcard,...}
├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + slash-menu + TldrawPlugin + EmbedPlugin
└── @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard extension)

@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
```

## Commands

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers

# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev

# Watch mode for core iteration
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
```

## Core: @haklex/rich-editor

Three entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./renderer` (RichRenderer).

### Directory Layout

- `src/nodes/` — 18 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Image, CodeBlock, KaTeX, Mermaid, Tldraw, Alert, Gallery, LinkCard, Component, Tabs, Grid, Details, Banner, Spoiler, Mention, Footnote, TaskListItem, Video)
- `src/plugins/` — 16 Lexical plugins (content insertion, auto-link, drag-drop, floating toolbar, markdown shortcuts, onChange with debounce)
- `src/styles/` — Vanilla Extract: 3 variants × 2 color schemes = 6 theme classes
- `src/transformers/` — Markdown shortcut transformers (alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, tasklist `- [x]`)
- `src/context/` — `ColorSchemeContext` (light/dark) + `RendererConfigContext` (custom renderer injection)
- `src/components/renderers/` — 12 built-in default renderers

### Custom Node Pattern

All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:

```typescript
class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  static importJSON(serialized) / exportJSON()
  decorate() → <RendererWrapper type="Foo" props={...} />
}
export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
```

`RendererWrapper` delegates to custom renderer (via `RendererConfig`) or falls back to built-in default.

### Node: Edit / Render Split

Nodes with heavy edit UI (Popover, DropdownMenu, LexicalNestedComposer etc.) are split into two classes for tree-shaking:

| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
|------------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
| `LinkCardNode` | `LinkCardEditNode` | `LinkCardEditDecorator` + Popover + lucide-react |
| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |

**Base node** `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper` (or lightweight read-only decorator). No edit UI imports.

**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.

Config files:
- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)

**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.

### Plugin Pattern

```typescript
export const INSERT_FOO_COMMAND = createCommand<Payload>('INSERT_FOO_COMMAND')
export function FooPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => editor.registerCommand(INSERT_FOO_COMMAND, handler, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR), [editor])
  return null
}
```

## Variant System

Controlled by `variant` prop + `ColorSchemeContext`. Theme CSS variables in `src/styles/vars.css.ts` via `createThemeContract`.

| Variant | Font | Size | Line-height | Max-width | Use case |
|---------|------|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
| article | system sans-serif | 16px | 1.75 | 65ch | Blog posts |
| note | CJK serif (Noto Serif CJK SC) | 16px | 1.8 | 65ch | Personal notes |
| comment | system sans-serif | 14px | 1.5 | none | Inline comments |

## Renderer Config (Custom Renderer Injection)

```typescript
interface RendererConfig {
  Alert?, CodeBlock?, Component?, Footnote?, Gallery?,
  Image?, KaTeX?, LinkCard?, Mermaid?, Mention?, Tabs?, Video?
}
<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
<RichRenderer rendererConfig={...} />
```

## Individual Renderer Packages

`@haklex/rich-renderer-*` packages provide feature-specific renderers with heavy dependencies isolated:
- `codeblock` — Shiki syntax highlighting
- `mermaid` — Mermaid diagram rendering
- `image` — Blurhash, captions, accent colors
- `video` — Responsive video players
- `gallery` — Image grid with lightbox
- `alert` — GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
- `linkcard` — Link preview cards
- `mention` — Social platform mention badges

`@haklex/rich-renderers` aggregates all, with sub-path exports: `./codeblock`, `./mermaid`, etc.

### Renderer: Edit / Static Split

Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:

| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
|---------|----------------------|---------------------|-----------------|
| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |

Packages without edit-specific heavy deps (`codeblock`, `image`, `video`, `gallery`, `linkcard`) do not need splitting.

Aggregator packages:
- `@haklex/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Depends on `@haklex/rich-renderers` for `enhancedRendererConfig` spread. Also re-exports edit nodes (`embedEditNodes`, `tabsEditNodes`), plugins (`EmbedPlugin`, `TldrawPlugin`, `SlashMenuPlugin`), and slash-menu utilities.

**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable` prop), splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.

**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export both from `index.ts`. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`.

## Integration: @haklex/rich-kit-shiro

Production bundle for the web app. Combines core + all renderers + tldraw + slash menu.

```typescript
import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor'   // → enhancedEditRendererConfig
import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer' // → enhancedRendererConfig
```

`ShiroEditor` uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers). `ShiroRenderer` uses `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers). This ensures the renderer entry tree-shakes all edit UI deps (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react edit icons).

## Tldraw Integration (@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw)

`TldrawNode` (DecoratorNode) stores tldraw snapshot as JSON string. Renderer lazy-loaded via `React.lazy()` with Suspense.

## Diff Viewer (@haklex/rich-diff)

```typescript
<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />
```

Compares two `SerializedEditorState` at node level. Side-by-side layout with insert/delete highlighting.

## Build Configuration

Each package uses the same Vite pattern:

- `BUILD_LIB=1` triggers library mode build
- Vanilla Extract plugin for CSS-in-TS → static CSS (zero runtime)
- All React, Lexical, and peer deps externalized
- Output: ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` declarations
- Target: ES2020

## Styling

Vanilla Extract (`*.css.ts` files) throughout. No Tailwind in editor packages. Theme contract defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, typography, and border-radius. Each variant+colorScheme combination produces a class name applied to the editor root.

### Neutral colors

Use a **neutral** (gray) color palette for secondary/muted text, borders, section labels, and descriptions—e.g. `#737373` / `#a3a3a3` (Tailwind neutral-500/400). Avoid tinted grays (slate, zinc, blue-gray) unless a design explicitly requires them. This keeps UI elements like slash menu sections and descriptions hue-neutral.
```

    23→
    24→export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    25→
    26→export const ALERT_TYPES: AlertType[] = [
    27→  'note',
    28→  'tip',

    33→
    34→export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {

    38→  warning: 'Warning',
    39→  caution: 'Caution',
    40→}
    41→
    42→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    43→  return createEditor({
    44→    namespace: 'AlertContent',

    46→    theme: editorTheme,

    48→      console.error('[AlertContent]', error)

    50→  })
    51→}
    52→
    53→export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
    54→  {
    55→    alertType: AlertType
    56→    content: SerializedEditorState
    57→  },
    58→  SerializedLexicalNode
    59→>
    60→
    61→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    62→  __alertType: AlertType
    63→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    64→
    65→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    66→    {
    67→      title: 'Callout',
    68→      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
    69→      description: 'Info callout block',
    70→      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
    71→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    72→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    73→        editor.update(() => {
    74→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
    75→        })
    76→      },
    77→    },
    78→    {
    79→      title: 'Tip',
    80→      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
    81→      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
    82→      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
    83→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    84→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    85→        editor.update(() => {
    86→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
    87→        })
    88→      },
    89→    },
    90→    {
    91→      title: 'Warning',
    92→      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
    93→      description: 'Warn about something',
    94→      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
    95→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    96→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    97→        editor.update(() => {
    98→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
    99→        })
   100→      },
   101→    },
   102→  ]
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'alert-quote'
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   109→    return new AlertQuoteNode(
   110→      node.__alertType,
   111→      node.__contentEditor,
   112→      node.__key,
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  constructor(
   117→    alertType: AlertType,
   118→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   119→    key?: NodeKey,
   120→  ) {
   121→    super(key)
   122→    this.__alertType = alertType
   123→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   127→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   128→    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   129→    return div
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   133→    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
   134→      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   135→    }
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  isInline(): boolean {
   140→    return false
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  getAlertType(): AlertType {
   144→    return this.__alertType
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
   148→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   149→    writable.__alertType = alertType
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   153→    return this.__contentEditor
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  getTextContent(): string {
   157→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   158→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   159→    })
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   163→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
   164→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   165→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   166→        serializedNode.content,
   167→      )
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→    return node
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
   174→    return {
   175→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   176→      type: 'alert-quote',
   177→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   178→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   179→      version: 1,
   180→    }
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   184→    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
   185→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   186→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   187→    })
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
   191→export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
   192→  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
   196→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   197→): node is AlertQuoteNode {
   198→  return node instanceof AlertQuoteNode
   199→}

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    21→
    22→const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    23→  info: 'note',
    24→  success: 'tip',
    25→  error: 'caution',
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
    29→  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
    30→  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
    34→  'note',
    35→  'tip',
    36→  'important',
    37→  'warning',
    38→  'caution',
    39→]
    40→
    41→export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
    42→  note: 'Note',
    43→  tip: 'Tip',
    44→  important: 'Important',
    45→  warning: 'Warning',
    46→  caution: 'Caution',
    47→}
    48→
    49→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    50→  return createEditor({
    51→    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    52→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    53→    theme: editorTheme,
    54→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    55→      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    56→    },
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
    61→  {
    62→    bannerType: BannerType
    63→    content: SerializedEditorState
    64→  },
    65→  SerializedLexicalNode
    66→>
    67→
    68→interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    69→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    70→}
    71→
    72→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    73→  __bannerType: BannerType
    74→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    75→
    76→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    77→    {
    78→      title: 'Banner',
    79→      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
    80→      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
    81→      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
    82→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    83→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    84→        editor.update(() => {
    85→          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
    86→        })
    87→      },
    88→    },
    89→  ]
    90→
    91→  static getType(): string {
    92→    return 'banner'
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    96→    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  constructor(
   100→    bannerType: BannerType,
   101→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   102→    key?: NodeKey,
   103→  ) {
   104→    super(key)
   105→    this.__bannerType = bannerType
   106→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   110→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   111→    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   112→    return div
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   116→    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
   117→      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  getBannerType(): BannerType {
   127→    return this.__bannerType
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
   131→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   132→    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   136→    return this.__contentEditor
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  getTextContent(): string {
   140→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   141→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   142→    })
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
   146→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
   147→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
   148→    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)
   149→
   150→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   151→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   152→        serializedNode.content,
   153→      )
   154→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   155→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   156→      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
   157→      const content = {
   158→        root: {
   159→          children: legacy.children,
   160→          direction: null,
   161→          format: '',
   162→          indent: 0,
   163→          type: 'root',
   164→          version: 1,
   165→        },
   166→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   167→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    return node
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
   175→    return {
   176→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   177→      type: 'banner',
   178→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   179→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   180→      version: 1,
   181→    }
   182→  }
   183→
   184→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   185→    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {
   186→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   187→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   188→    })
   189→  }
   190→}
   191→
   192→export function $createBannerNode(bannerType: BannerType): BannerNode {
   193→  return new BannerNode(bannerType)
   194→}
   195→
   196→export function $isBannerNode(
   197→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   198→): node is BannerNode {
   199→  return node instanceof BannerNode
   200→}
   201→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  SerializedEditorState,
     5→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     8→import { createElement } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import { BannerEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/BannerEditDecorator'
    11→import {
    12→  BannerNode,
    13→  normalizeBannerType,
    14→  type SerializedBannerNode,
    15→} from './BannerNode'
    16→
    17→interface LegacySerializedBannerEditNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    18→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    19→}
    20→
    21→export class BannerEditNode extends BannerNode {
    22→  static clone(node: BannerEditNode): BannerEditNode {
    23→    return new BannerEditNode(
    24→      node.__bannerType,
    25→      node.__contentEditor,
    26→      node.__key,
    27→    )
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerEditNode {
    31→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerEditNode
    32→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
    33→    const node = new BannerEditNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→    if (serializedNode.content) {
    36→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
    37→        serializedNode.content,
    38→      )
    39→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    40→    } else if (legacy.children) {
    41→      const content = {
    42→        root: {
    43→          children: legacy.children,
    44→          direction: null,
    45→          format: '',
    46→          indent: 0,
    47→          type: 'root',
    48→          version: 1,
    49→        },
    50→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    51→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
    52→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    return node
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    59→    return createElement(BannerEditDecorator, {
    60→      nodeKey: this.__key,
    61→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
    62→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    63→    })
    64→  }
    65→}
    66→

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/FootnoteNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import { FootnoteRenderer } from '../components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer'
    13→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    14→
    15→export type SerializedFootnoteNode = Spread<
    16→  {
    17→    identifier: string
    18→  },
    19→  SerializedLexicalNode
    20→>
    21→
    22→export class FootnoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    23→  __identifier: string
    24→
    25→  static getType(): string {
    26→    return 'footnote'
    27→  }
    28→
    29→  static clone(node: FootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    30→    return new FootnoteNode(node.__identifier, node.__key)
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  constructor(identifier: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    34→    super(key)
    35→    this.__identifier = identifier
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    39→    const sup = document.createElement('sup')
    40→    sup.className = 'rich-footnote'
    41→    return sup
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    45→    return false
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  isInline(): boolean {
    49→    return true
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedFootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    53→    return $createFootnoteNode(serializedNode.identifier)
    54→  }
    55→
    56→  exportJSON(): SerializedFootnoteNode {
    57→    return {
    58→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    59→      type: 'footnote',
    60→      identifier: this.__identifier,
    61→      version: 1,
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  getIdentifier(): string {
    66→    return this.getLatest().__identifier
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  setIdentifier(identifier: string): void {
    70→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    71→    writable.__identifier = identifier
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    75→    return createRendererDecoration('Footnote', FootnoteRenderer, {
    76→      identifier: this.__identifier,
    77→    })
    78→  }
    79→}
    80→
    81→export function $createFootnoteNode(identifier: string): FootnoteNode {
    82→  return new FootnoteNode(identifier)
    83→}
    84→
    85→export function $isFootnoteNode(
    86→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    87→): node is FootnoteNode {
    88→  return node instanceof FootnoteNode
    89→}
    90→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import {
     2→  TooltipContent,
     3→  TooltipRoot,
     4→  TooltipTrigger,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6→import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import {
    10→  useFootnoteContent,
    11→  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12→} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13→
    14→export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15→  identifier: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19→  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20→  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21→
    22→  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24→
    25→  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27→      const target =
    28→        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29→        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30→      if (!target) return
    31→
    32→      e.preventDefault()
    33→      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34→      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35→
    36→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37→        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38→      }, 1200)
    39→    },
    40→    [identifier, targetId],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47→      <TooltipRoot>
    48→        <TooltipTrigger
    49→          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50→            <a
    51→              {...props}
    52→              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53→              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54→              id={referenceId}
    55→              role="doc-noteref"
    56→              aria-label={
    57→                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58→              }
    59→              onClick={handleClick}
    60→              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61→            >
    62→              {label}
    63→            </a>
    64→          )}
    65→        />
    66→        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67→      </TooltipRoot>
    68→    </span>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/RendererWrapper.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
     3→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     4→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     5→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     6→
     7→import { allNodes } from '../config'
     8→import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     9→import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
    10→import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
    11→import { HeadingAnchorPlugin } from '../plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
    14→import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    15→
    16→export function RichRenderer({
    17→  value,
    18→  variant = 'article',
    19→  theme = 'light',
    20→  className,
    21→  style,
    22→  as: Component = 'div',
    23→  rendererConfig,
    24→  extraNodes,
    25→}: RichRendererProps) {
    26→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    27→
    28→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    29→
    30→  const initialConfig = {
    31→    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    nodes,
    34→    editable: false,
    35→    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    36→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    37→      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    38→    },
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    43→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    44→        <RendererConfigProvider
    45→          config={rendererConfig}
    46→          mode="renderer"
    47→          variant={variant}
    48→        >
    49→          <Component
    50→            className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    51→            style={style}
    52→            data-theme={theme}
    53→          >
    54→            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    55→              <FootnotePlugin>
    56→                <RichTextPlugin
    57→                  contentEditable={
    58→                    <ContentEditable
    59→                      className="rich-content__body"
    60→                      style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                      aria-placeholder=""
    62→                      placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→                    />
    64→                  }
    65→                  ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→                />
    67→                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
    68→              </FootnotePlugin>
    69→            </LexicalComposer>
    70→          </Component>
    71→        </RendererConfigProvider>
    72→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    73→    </PortalThemeProvider>
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  SerializedEditorState,
     5→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import { createEditor } from 'lexical'
     8→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     9→import { createElement } from 'react'
    10→
    11→import { GridEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/GridEditDecorator'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import {
    14→  GridContainerNode,
    15→  type SerializedGridContainerNode,
    16→} from './GridContainerNode'
    17→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    18→
    19→interface LegacySerializedGridEditNode {
    20→  type?: string
    21→  version?: number
    22→  cols?: number
    23→  gap?: string | number
    24→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    26→}
    27→
    28→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    29→  return createEditor({
    30→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    31→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    34→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→}
    38→
    39→export class GridEditNode extends GridContainerNode {
    40→  static clone(node: GridEditNode): GridEditNode {
    41→    return new GridEditNode(
    42→      node.__cols,
    43→      node.__gap,
    44→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    45→      node.__key,
    46→    )
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode): GridEditNode {
    50→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridEditNode
    51→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
    52→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
    53→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
    54→    const node = new GridEditNode(cols, gap)
    55→
    56→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
    57→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
    58→        const editor = createCellEditor()
    59→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
    60→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    61→        return editor
    62→      })
    63→      node.__cellEditors = editors
    64→    } else if (legacy.children) {
    65→      const { children } = legacy
    66→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
    67→        const editor = createCellEditor()
    68→        const content = {
    69→          root: {
    70→            children: [child],
    71→            direction: null,
    72→            format: '',
    73→            indent: 0,
    74→            type: 'root',
    75→            version: 1,
    76→          },
    77→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    78→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
    79→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    80→        return editor
    81→      })
    82→      node.__cellEditors = editors
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    return node
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    89→    return createElement(GridEditDecorator, {
    90→      nodeKey: this.__key,
    91→      cols: this.__cols,
    92→      gap: this.__gap,
    93→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
    94→    })
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type {
     3→  EditorConfig,
     4→  LexicalEditor,
     5→  LexicalNode,
     6→  NodeKey,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
    14→
    15→const LazyStaticRenderer = lazy(() =>
    16→  import('./TldrawStaticRenderer').then((m) => ({
    17→    default: m.TldrawStaticRenderer,
    18→  })),
    19→)
    20→const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
    21→  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    22→    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
    23→  })),
    24→)
    25→
    26→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    27→  { snapshot: string },
    28→  SerializedLexicalNode
    29→>
    30→
    31→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    32→  __snapshot: string
    33→
    34→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    35→    {
    36→      title: 'Whiteboard',
    37→      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
    38→      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
    39→      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
    40→      section: 'MEDIA',
    41→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    42→        editor.update(() => {
    43→          $insertNodes([$createTldrawNode('{}')])
    44→        })
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  ]
    48→
    49→  static getType(): string {
    50→    return 'tldraw'
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    54→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    58→    super(key)
    59→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    63→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    64→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    65→    return div
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    69→    return false
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  isInline(): boolean {
    73→    return false
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    77→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    81→    return {
    82→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    83→      type: 'tldraw',
    84→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    85→      version: 1,
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  getSnapshot(): string {
    90→    return this.__snapshot
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    94→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    95→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    99→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   100→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   101→
   102→    const fallback = createElement('div', {
   103→      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
   104→      style: {
   105→        position: 'relative',
   106→        width: '100%',
   107→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
   108→        margin: '1rem 0',
   109→      },
   110→    })
   111→
   112→    if (isEditable) {
   113→      return createElement(
   114→        Suspense,
   115→        { fallback },
   116→        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
   117→          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
   118→          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
   119→            editor.update(() => {
   120→              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
   121→              if (node) {
   122→                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
   123→              }
   124→            })
   125→          },
   126→        }),
   127→      )
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    return createElement(
   131→      Suspense,
   132→      { fallback },
   133→      createElement(LazyStaticRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
   134→    )
   135→  }
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
   139→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
   140→}
   141→
   142→export function $isTldrawNode(
   143→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   144→): node is TldrawNode {
   145→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
   146→}
   147→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawStaticRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
    92→  const {
    93→    snapshot: data,
    94→    loading: dataLoading,
    95→    error: dataError,
    96→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
    97→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    98→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
    99→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   100→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   101→
   102→  useEffect(() => {
   103→    import('tldraw')
   104→      .then((mod) => {
   105→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   106→        setLibLoading(false)
   107→      })
   108→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   109→  }, [])
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   113→      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   114→    }
   115→  }, [theme])
   116→
   117→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   118→    (editor: any) => {
   119→      editorRef.current = editor
   120→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   121→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   122→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   123→      setTimeout(() => {
   124→        editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false })
   125→      }, 100)
   126→    },
   127→    [theme],
   128→  )
   129→
   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   131→    if (!TldrawComponent || !data) return
   132→    presentDialog({
   133→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   134→        <TldrawExpandContent
   135→          dismiss={dismiss}
   136→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   137→          data={data}
   138→          theme={theme}
   139→        />
   140→      ),
   141→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   142→      portalClassName,
   143→      showCloseButton: false,
   144→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   145→    })
   146→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   147→
   148→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   149→
   150→  if (loading) {
   151→    return (
   152→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   153→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   154→      </div>
   155→    )
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  if (dataError || !data) {
   159→    return (
   160→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   161→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   162→      </div>
   163→    )
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  if (!TldrawComponent) {
   167→    return (
   168→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   169→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
   170→      </div>
   171→    )
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  return (
   175→    <div
   176→      className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}
   177→      data-theme={theme}
   178→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   179→    >
   180→      <TldrawErrorBoundary
   181→        fallback={
   182→          <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to render tldraw</div>
   183→        }
   184→      >
   185→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={handleMount} />
   186→      </TldrawErrorBoundary>
   187→
   188→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   189→        <button
   190→          type="button"
   191→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   192→          title="Zoom In"
   193→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   194→        >
   195→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   196→        </button>
   197→        <button
   198→          type="button"
   199→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   200→          title="Zoom Out"
   201→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   202→        >
   203→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   204→        </button>
   205→        <button
   206→          type="button"
   207→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   208→          title="Fit to Content"
   209→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   210→        >
   211→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   212→        </button>
   213→        <button
   214→          type="button"
   215→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   216→          title="Expand"
   217→          onClick={handleExpand}
   218→        >
   219→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   220→        </button>
   221→      </div>
   222→    </div>
   223→  )
   224→}
   225→
   226→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   227→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   228→  { hasError: boolean }
   229→> {
   230→  state = { hasError: false }
   231→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   232→    return { hasError: true }
   233→  }
   234→  render() {
   235→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   236→  }
   237→}
   238→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type {
     2→  GalleryImage,
     3→  GalleryRendererProps,
     4→  SlashMenuItemConfig,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import { createRendererDecoration } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     7→import type {
     8→  EditorConfig,
     9→  LexicalEditor,
    10→  LexicalNode,
    11→  NodeKey,
    12→  SerializedLexicalNode,
    13→  Spread,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    16→import { Images } from 'lucide-react'
    17→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    18→import { createElement } from 'react'
    19→
    20→import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'
    21→
    22→export type SerializedGalleryNode = Spread<
    23→  {
    24→    images: GalleryImage[]
    25→    layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    26→  },
    27→  SerializedLexicalNode
    28→>
    29→
    30→export interface GalleryNodePayload {
    31→  images: GalleryImage[]
    32→  layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    33→}
    34→
    35→export class GalleryNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    36→  __images: GalleryImage[]
    37→  __layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    38→
    39→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    40→    {
    41→      title: 'Gallery',
    42→      icon: createElement(Images, { size: 20 }),
    43→      description: 'Image gallery grid',
    44→      keywords: ['gallery', 'images', 'grid'],
    45→      section: 'MEDIA',
    46→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    47→        editor.update(() => {
    48→          $insertNodes([$createGalleryNode({ images: [] })])
    49→        })
    50→      },
    51→    },
    52→  ]
    53→
    54→  static getType(): string {
    55→    return 'gallery'
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  static clone(node: GalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    59→    return new GalleryNode(
    60→      {
    61→        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
    62→        layout: node.__layout,
    63→      },
    64→      node.__key,
    65→    )
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    69→    super(key)
    70→    this.__images = payload.images
    71→    this.__layout = payload.layout || 'grid'
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    75→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    76→    div.className = `rich-gallery rich-gallery-${this.__layout}`
    77→    return div
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    81→    return false
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  isInline(): boolean {
    85→    return false
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    89→    return $createGalleryNode({
    90→      images: serializedNode.images,
    91→      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    92→    })
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  exportJSON(): SerializedGalleryNode {
    96→    return {
    97→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    98→      type: 'gallery',
    99→      images: this.__images,
   100→      layout: this.__layout,
   101→      version: 1,
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  getImages(): GalleryImage[] {
   106→    return this.getLatest().__images
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  setImages(images: GalleryImage[]): void {
   110→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   111→    writable.__images = images
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getLayout(): 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel' {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__layout
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setLayout(layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    writable.__layout = layout
   121→  }
   122→
   123→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   124→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   125→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   126→    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
   127→      images: this.__images,
   128→      layout: this.__layout,
   129→      ...(isEditable && {
   130→        onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
   131→          editor.update(() => {
   132→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   133→            if (node) node.setImages(images)
   134→          })
   135→        },
   136→        onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
   137→          editor.update(() => {
   138→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   139→            if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
   140→          })
   141→        },
   142→      }),
   143→    }
   144→    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
   145→  }
   146→}
   147→
   148→export function $createGalleryNode(payload: GalleryNodePayload): GalleryNode {
   149→  return new GalleryNode(payload)
   150→}
   151→
   152→export function $isGalleryNode(
   153→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   154→): node is GalleryNode {
   155→  return node instanceof GalleryNode
   156→}
   157→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { RichEditorProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import { BlockHandlePlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle'
     4→import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
     5→import { FloatingLinkEditorPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit'
     6→import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
     7→import {
     8→  TableCellResizerPlugin,
     9→  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
    10→} from '@haklex/rich-plugin-table'
    11→import { galleryNodes, TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    12→import {
    13→  codeSnippetEditNodes,
    14→  ConvertToLinkCardAction,
    15→  embedEditNodes,
    16→  EmbedPlugin,
    17→  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
    18→  katexEditNodes,
    19→  linkCardEditNodes,
    20→  PasteLinkCardPlugin,
    21→  TldrawPlugin,
    22→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'
    23→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    24→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    25→import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
    26→
    27→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    28→  TldrawNode,
    29→  ...embedEditNodes,
    30→  ...linkCardEditNodes,
    31→  ...katexEditNodes,
    32→  ...galleryNodes,
    33→  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
    34→]
    35→
    36→export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    37→  RichEditorProps,
    38→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    39→> {
    40→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    41→  actions?: ReactNode
    42→  selfHostnames?: string[]
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function ShiroEditor({
    46→  extraNodes,
    47→  actions,
    48→  children,
    49→  selfHostnames,
    50→  ...props
    51→}: ShiroEditorProps) {
    52→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    53→    () =>
    54→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    55→    [extraNodes],
    56→  )
    57→
    58→  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    59→    ({
    60→      url,
    61→      linkKey,
    62→      actionButtonClassName,
    63→    }: {
    64→      url: string
    65→      linkKey: string
    66→      actionButtonClassName: string
    67→    }) => (
    68→      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
    69→        url={url}
    70→        linkKey={linkKey}
    71→        className={actionButtonClassName}
    72→      />
    73→    ),
    74→    [],
    75→  )
    76→
    77→  return (
    78→    <RichEditor
    79→      {...props}
    80→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    81→      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    82→      actions={
    83→        <>
    84→          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    85→          {actions}
    86→        </>
    87→      }
    88→    >
    89→      <BlockHandlePlugin />
    90→      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
    91→      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
    92→      <TldrawPlugin />
    93→      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
    94→      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
    95→      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
    96→      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
    97→      {children}
    98→    </RichEditor>
    99→  )
   100→}
   101→
```
</details></tool-use>
