<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'

import { $createBannerEditNode } from '../nodes/BannerEditNode'
import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'

const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
  note: 'note',
  info: 'note',
  tip: 'tip',
  success: 'tip',
  important: 'important',
  warning: 'warning',
  warn: 'warning',
  error: 'caution',
  danger: 'caution',
  caution: 'caution',
}

export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const type = match[1]
    const params = match[2]

    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]

      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
        child.exportJSON(),
      )
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: [
            {
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: serializedChildren,
              direction: null,
              format: '',
              indent: 0,
              textFormat: 0,
              textStyle: '',
              version: 1,
            },
          ],
          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,
          type: 'root',
          version: 1,
        },
      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

      const banner = $createBannerEditNode(bannerType, content)
      parentNode.replace(banner)
      return
    }

    if (type === 'details') {
      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'

      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)

      children.forEach((child) => {
        details.append(child)
      })

      parentNode.replace(details)
      return
    }

    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    children.forEach((child) => {
      paragraph.append(child)
    })
    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
  },
}

```

```text
<tool_use_error>File has not been read yet. Read it first before writing to it.</tool_use_error>
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode } from 'lexical'

import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
import { extractTextContent } from '../utils/extractTextContent'

function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
}

export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  dependencies: [],
  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    const cells = node.getCellStates().map((state) => extractTextContent(state))
    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
  },
  regExp: /a^/,
  replace: () => {},
  type: 'element',
}

```

</details></tool-use>

```typescript
import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'

import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'

const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
  note: 'note',
  info: 'note',
  tip: 'tip',
  success: 'tip',
  important: 'important',
  warning: 'warning',
  warn: 'warning',
  error: 'caution',
  danger: 'caution',
  caution: 'caution',
}

export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const type = match[1]
    const params = match[2]

    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]

      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
        child.exportJSON(),
      )
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: [
            {
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: serializedChildren,
              direction: null,
              format: '',
              indent: 0,
              textFormat: 0,
              textStyle: '',
              version: 1,
            },

          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,

          version: 1,

      parentNode.replace(banner)
      return

    if (type === 'details') {
      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'

      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)

      children.forEach((child) => {
        details.append(child)
      })

      parentNode.replace(details)
      return
    }

    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    children.forEach((child) => {
      paragraph.append(child)
    })
    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
  },
}
```

```typescript
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode } from 'lexical'

import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
import { extractTextContent } from '../utils/extractTextContent'

function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
}

export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  dependencies: [],
  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    const cells = node.getCellStates().map((state) => extractTextContent(state))
    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
  },
  regExp: /a^/,
  replace: () => {},
  type: 'element',
}

```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'

export const MermaidRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <pre className={css.mermaidLoading}>
        <code>{content}</code>
      </pre>
    )
  }

  if (!imgSrc) {
    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
  }

  return (
    <div className={css.mermaidContainer} style={{ cursor: 'default' }}>
      <img src={imgSrc} alt="Mermaid diagram" width={width} height={height} />
    </div>
  )
}

export default MermaidRenderer

```

```text
`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` package 已创建，共 11 文件，结构如下:

```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── vite.config.ts
└── src/
    ├── index.ts
    ├── RichSSRRenderer.tsx
    ├── types.ts
    ├── engine/
    │   ├── renderNode.tsx
    │   ├── renderBuiltinNode.tsx
    │   └── renderTextNode.tsx
    └── preprocess/
        ├── footnote.ts
        └── headingSlug.ts
```

要点:

- **`vite.config.ts`** 复用 `packages/vite.shared.ts` 之 `createViteConfig`，与 `rich-editor` 同模式，启用 `jsx: 'automatic'`。
- **`tsconfig.json`** 循 `rich-style-token` 之例，`jsx: "react-jsx"`，`moduleResolution: "bundler"`。
- **`RichSSRRenderer.tsx`** 以 `@lexical/headless` 之 `createHeadlessEditor` 解析 `SerializedEditorState`，经 `$getRoot` 遍历 node tree，decorator node 取 `getDecorators<ReactNode>()` 渲染，builtin node 则由 `renderBuiltinNode` / `renderTextNode` 映射为 React elements。外层以 `PortalThemeProvider`、`ColorSchemeProvider`、`RendererConfigProvider`、`FootnoteDefinitionsProvider`、`NestedContentRendererProvider` 层层包裹，确保 context 完备。
- **`preprocess/footnote.ts`** 遍历 editor state JSON，收集 footnote identifier 与 definition，生成 `displayNumberMap`。
- **`preprocess/headingSlug.ts`** 提供 `textToSlug` 工具函数。
- **`engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`** 处理 paragraph、heading（含 slug 去重）、quote、list、link、table、code、linebreak 等 builtin node type。
agentId: a4e49bd4202542218 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
```

Create the `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` package at `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/`. This is a headless SSR engine for rendering Lexical editor state to React elements without `@lexical/react`.

First, read `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/vite.shared.ts` (or `.js` or `.mjs`) to understand the shared vite config pattern. Also read any existing tsconfig in sibling packages.

Then create all files. Structure:
```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
  src/
    index.ts
    RichSSRRenderer.tsx
    types.ts
    engine/
      renderNode.tsx
      renderBuiltinNode.tsx
      renderTextNode.tsx
    preprocess/
      footnote.ts
      headingSlug.ts
  package.json
  tsconfig.json (if other packages have one)
  vite.config.ts
```

## package.json:
```json
{
  "name": "@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "Headless SSR engine for Lexical rich content",
  "license": "MIT",
  "type": "module",
  "exports": {
    ".": "./src/index.ts"
  },
  "main": "./src/index.ts",
  "files": ["dist"],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build"
  },
  "dependencies": {
```

```ts
import type { Klass, LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'

import type { ColorScheme, RendererConfig, RichEditorVariant } from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'

export interface RichSSRRendererProps {
  value: SerializedEditorState
  variant?: RichEditorVariant
  theme?: ColorScheme
  className?: string
  style?: CSSProperties
  as?: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
  rendererConfig?: RendererConfig
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}
```

## engine/renderTextNode.tsx:
```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

const FORMAT_FLAGS: [number, string][] = [
  [1, 'rich-text-bold'],
  [2, 'rich-text-italic'],
  [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
  [8, 'rich-text-underline'],
  [16, 'rich-text-code'],
  [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'],
  [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
]

export function renderTextNode(node: any, key: string): ReactNode {
  let element: ReactNode = node.text
  const format = node.format || 0

  for (const [flag, className] of FORMAT_FLAGS) {
    if (format & flag) {
      element = <span key={`${key}-${flag}`} className={className}>{element}</span>
    }
  }

  return element
}
```

## engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx:
```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

function textToSlug(text: string): string {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim()
    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
}

function extractText(node: any): string {
  if (node.text) return node.text
  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
  return ''
}

export function renderBuiltinNode(
  node: any,
  key: string,
  children: ReactNode[] | null,
  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
): ReactNode {
  switch (node.type) {
    case 'root':
      return <>{children}</>
    case 'paragraph': {
      const align = node.format ? { textAlign: node.format } as const : undefined
      return <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>{children}</p>
    }
    case 'heading': {
      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
      const text = extractText(node)
      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
      let slug = baseSlug
      if (baseSlug) {
        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
        if (count !== undefined) {
          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
        } else {
          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
        }
      }
      return (
        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
          {slug && <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />}
          {children}
        </Tag>
      )
    }
    case 'quote':
      return <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">{children}</blockquote>
    case 'list': {
      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
      const cls = node.listType === 'number' ? 'rich-list-ol'
        : node.listType === 'check' ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul' : 'rich-list-ul'
      return <Tag key={key} className={cls} start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}>{children}</Tag>
    }
    case 'listitem': {
      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
      const cls = isChecklist
        ? (node.checked ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked' : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked')
        : 'rich-list-item'
      return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
    }
    case 'link':
      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target={node.target} rel={node.rel}>{children}</a>
    case 'autolink':
      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{children}</a>
    case 'horizontalrule':
      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
    case 'table':
      return (
        <div key={key} className="rich-table-scrollable-wrapper">
          <table className="rich-table">{children}</table>
        </div>
      )
    case 'tablerow':
      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
    case 'tablecell': {
      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
      const cls = node.headerState ? 'rich-table-cell-header' : 'rich-table-cell'
      return <CellTag key={key} className={cls} colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}>{children}</CellTag>
    }
    case 'code':
      return <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block"><code>{children}</code></pre>
    case 'code-highlight':
      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
    case 'linebreak':
      return <br key={key} />
    case 'tab':
      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
    default:
      return null
  }
}
```

## preprocess/footnote.ts:
```ts
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

export interface FootnoteData {
  definitions: Record<string, string>
  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
}

export function preprocessFootnotes(state: SerializedEditorState): FootnoteData {
  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
  let counter = 1

  function walk(node: any): void {
    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
      const id = node.identifier
      if (!seen.has(id)) {
        seen.add(id)
        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
      }
    }
    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    }
    if (node.children) {
      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    }
    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
      walk(node.content)
    }
    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
      for (const cell of node.cells) {
        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
      }
    }
  }

  walk(state)
  
  for (const id of seen) {
    if (!(id in definitions)) {
      definitions[id] = ''
    }
  }

  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
}
```

```ts
    .toLowerCase()

    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')

}
```

## RichSSRRenderer.tsx:
```tsx
import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import {
  allNodes,
  ColorSchemeProvider,
  editorTheme,
  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
  getVariantClass,
  NestedContentRendererProvider,
  RendererConfigProvider,
} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

import { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
import { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
import { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from './types'

function renderTree(
  node: any,
  decorations: Record<string, ReactNode>,
  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
  key: string,
): ReactNode {
  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

  if (decorations[nodeKey] !== undefined) {
    return decorations[nodeKey]
  }

  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
  }

  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
  if (node.getChildren) {
    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
      )
    }
  }

  return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
}

function renderEditorToReact(
  value: SerializedEditorState,
  nodes: any[],
): { content: ReactNode; footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>; renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode } {
  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
    nodes,
    theme: editorTheme,
    editable: false,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichSSRRenderer]', error)
    },
  })

  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
  editor.setEditorState(editorState)

  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
  const decorations = editor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()

  let content: ReactNode = null
  editorState.read(() => {
    const root = $getRoot()
    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    const children = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
      renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `ssr-${i}`),
    )
    content = <>{children}</>
  })

  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
      nodes,
      theme: editorTheme,
      editable: false,
      onError: (error: Error) => {
        console.error('[RichSSRRenderer:nested]', error)
      },
    })
    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
    const nestedDecorations = nestedEditor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()
    let nested: ReactNode = null
    nestedState.read(() => {
      const root = $getRoot()
      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
      const ch = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, nestedDecorations, headingSlugs, `nested-${i}`),
      )
      nested = <>{ch}</>
    })
    return nested
  }

  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
}

export function RichSSRRenderer({
  value,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  className,
  style,
  as: Component = 'div',
  rendererConfig,
  extraNodes,
}: RichSSRRendererProps) {
  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes

  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(value, nodes)

  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider
          config={rendererConfig}
          mode="renderer"
          variant={variant}
        >
          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
          >
            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
              <Component
                className={classes}
                style={style}
                data-theme={theme}
              >
                {content}
              </Component>
            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
```

## 2. New file: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx`
```tsx
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import {
  codeSnippetNodes,
  embedNodes,
  enhancedRendererConfig,
  galleryNodes,
  TldrawNode,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetNodes,
]

export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
  RichSSRRendererProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichSSRRenderer
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    />
  )
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./packages/vite.shared.ts`

```text
     1→import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     2→import { resolve } from 'node:path'
     3→
     4→import type { UserConfig } from 'vite'
     5→
     6→export interface SharedViteOptions {
     7→  entry?: string | Record<string, string>
     8→  vanillaExtract?: boolean
     9→  esbuild?: { jsx: string; jsxImportSource: string }
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BASE_EXTERNALS = ['react', 'react-dom', 'react/jsx-runtime']
    13→
    14→export async function createViteConfig(
    15→  options: SharedViteOptions = {},
    16→): Promise<UserConfig> {
    17→  const { entry = 'src/index.ts', vanillaExtract = true, esbuild } = options
    18→
    19→  const dts = (await import('vite-plugin-dts')).default
    20→  const plugins: UserConfig['plugins'] = []
    21→
    22→  if (vanillaExtract) {
    23→    const { vanillaExtractPlugin } =
    24→      await import('@vanilla-extract/vite-plugin')
    25→    plugins.push(vanillaExtractPlugin())
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  plugins.push(
    29→    dts({ entryRoot: 'src', outDir: 'dist', tsconfigPath: './tsconfig.json' }),
    30→  )
    31→
    32→  const cwd = process.cwd()
    33→  const isMap = typeof entry !== 'string'
    34→  const libEntry = isMap
    35→    ? Object.fromEntries(
    36→        Object.entries(entry).map(([k, v]) => [k, resolve(cwd, v)]),
    37→      )
    38→    : resolve(cwd, entry)
    39→
    40→  const fileName = isMap
    41→    ? (_: string, name: string) => `${name}.mjs`
    42→    : () => 'index.mjs'
    43→
    44→  const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(resolve(cwd, 'package.json'), 'utf-8'))
    45→  const depNames = new Set([
    46→    ...BASE_EXTERNALS,
    47→    ...Object.keys(pkg.dependencies || {}),
    48→    ...Object.keys(pkg.peerDependencies || {}),
    49→  ])
    50→
    51→  const rollupExternal = (id: string) => {
    52→    if (id[0] === '.' || id[0] === '/' || id[0] === '\0') return false
    53→    if (depNames.has(id)) return true
    54→    const slashIdx = id.indexOf('/')
    55→    if (slashIdx > 0) {
    56→      const pkgName =
    57→        id[0] === '@'
    58→          ? id.slice(0, id.indexOf('/', slashIdx + 1))
    59→          : id.slice(0, slashIdx)
    60→      return pkgName ? depNames.has(pkgName) : false
    61→    }
    62→    return false
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return {
    66→    plugins,
    67→    ...(esbuild && { esbuild }),
    68→    build: {
    69→      lib: { entry: libEntry, formats: ['es'], fileName },
    70→      rollupOptions: {
    71→        external: rollupExternal,
    72→        output: { preserveModules: false },
    73→      },
```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import {
  codeSnippetNodes,
  embedNodes,
  enhancedRendererConfig,
  galleryNodes,
  TldrawNode,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetNodes,
]

export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
  RichSSRRendererProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichSSRRenderer
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    />
  )
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: <REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

const FORMAT_FLAGS: [number, string][] = [
  [1, 'rich-text-bold'],
  [2, 'rich-text-italic'],
  [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
  [8, 'rich-text-underline'],
  [16, 'rich-text-code'],
  [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'],
  [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
]

export function renderTextNode(node: any, key: string): ReactNode {
  let element: ReactNode = node.text
  const format = node.format || 0

  for (const [flag, className] of FORMAT_FLAGS) {
    if (format & flag) {
      element = <span key={`${key}-${flag}`} className={className}>{element}</span>
    }
  }

  return element
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: <REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderTextNode.tsx
```

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

function textToSlug(text: string): string {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim()
    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
}

function extractText(node: any): string {
  if (node.text) return node.text
  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
  return ''
}

export function renderBuiltinNode(
  node: any,
  key: string,
  children: ReactNode[] | null,
  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
): ReactNode {
  switch (node.type) {
    case 'root':
      return <>{children}</>
    case 'paragraph': {
      const align = node.format ? { textAlign: node.format } as const : undefined
      return <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>{children}</p>
    }
    case 'heading': {
      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
      const text = extractText(node)
      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
      let slug = baseSlug
      if (baseSlug) {
        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
        if (count !== undefined) {
          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
        } else {
          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
        }
      }
      return (
        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
          {slug && <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />}
          {children}
        </Tag>
      )
    }
    case 'quote':
      return <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">{children}</blockquote>
    case 'list': {
      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
      const cls = node.listType === 'number' ? 'rich-list-ol'
        : node.listType === 'check' ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul' : 'rich-list-ul'
      return <Tag key={key} className={cls} start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}>{children}</Tag>
    }
    case 'listitem': {
      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
      const cls = isChecklist
        ? (node.checked ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked' : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked')
        : 'rich-list-item'
      return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
    }
    case 'link':
      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target={node.target} rel={node.rel}>{children}</a>
    case 'autolink':
      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{children}</a>
    case 'horizontalrule':
      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
    case 'table':
      return (
        <div key={key} className="rich-table-scrollable-wrapper">
          <table className="rich-table">{children}</table>
        </div>
      )
    case 'tablerow':
      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
    case 'tablecell': {
      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
      const cls = node.headerState ? 'rich-table-cell-header' : 'rich-table-cell'
      return <CellTag key={key} className={cls} colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}>{children}</CellTag>
    }
    case 'code':
      return <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block"><code>{children}</code></pre>
    case 'code-highlight':
      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
    case 'linebreak':
      return <br key={key} />
    case 'tab':
      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
    default:
      return null
  }
}

```


```typescript
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

export interface FootnoteData {
  definitions: Record<string, string>
  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
}

export function preprocessFootnotes(state: SerializedEditorState): FootnoteData {
  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
  let counter = 1

  function walk(node: any): void {
    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
      const id = node.identifier
      if (!seen.has(id)) {
        seen.add(id)
        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
      }
    }
    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    }
    if (node.children) {
      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    }
    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
      walk(node.content)
    }
    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
      for (const cell of node.cells) {
        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
      }
    }
  }

  walk(state)

  for (const id of seen) {
    if (!(id in definitions)) {
      definitions[id] = ''
    }
  }

  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
}

```

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import {
  allNodes,
  ColorSchemeProvider,
  editorTheme,
  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
  getVariantClass,
  NestedContentRendererProvider,
  RendererConfigProvider,
} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

import { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
import { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
import { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from './types'

function renderTree(
  node: any,
  decorations: Record<string, ReactNode>,
  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
  key: string,
): ReactNode {
  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

  if (decorations[nodeKey] !== undefined) {
    return decorations[nodeKey]
  }

  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
  }

  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
  if (node.getChildren) {
    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
      )
    }
  }

  return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
}

function renderEditorToReact(
  value: SerializedEditorState,
  nodes: any[],
): { content: ReactNode; footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>; renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode } {
  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
    nodes,
    theme: editorTheme,
    editable: false,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichSSRRenderer]', error)
    },
  })

  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
  editor.setEditorState(editorState)

  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
  const decorations = editor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()

  let content: ReactNode = null
  editorState.read(() => {
    const root = $getRoot()
    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    const children = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
      renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `ssr-${i}`),
    )
    content = <>{children}</>
  })

  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
      nodes,
      theme: editorTheme,
      editable: false,
      onError: (error: Error) => {
        console.error('[RichSSRRenderer:nested]', error)
      },
    })
    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
    const nestedDecorations = nestedEditor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()
    let nested: ReactNode = null
    nestedState.read(() => {
      const root = $getRoot()
      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
      const ch = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, nestedDecorations, headingSlugs, `nested-${i}`),
      )
      nested = <>{ch}</>
    })
    return nested
  }

  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
}

export function RichSSRRenderer({
  value,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  className,
  style,
  as: Component = 'div',
  rendererConfig,
  extraNodes,
}: RichSSRRendererProps) {
  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes

  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(value, nodes)

  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider
          config={rendererConfig}
          mode="renderer"
          variant={variant}
        >
          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
          >
            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
              <Component
                className={classes}
                style={style}
                data-theme={theme}
              >
                {content}
              </Component>
            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: <REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx
```
</details></tool-use>

`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` package 已创建，共 11 文件，结构如下:

```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── vite.config.ts
└── src/
    ├── index.ts
    ├── RichSSRRenderer.tsx
    ├── types.ts
    ├── engine/
    │   ├── renderNode.tsx
    │   ├── renderBuiltinNode.tsx
    │   └── renderTextNode.tsx
    └── preprocess/
        ├── footnote.ts
        └── headingSlug.ts
```

要点:

- **`vite.config.ts`** 复用 `packages/vite.shared.ts` 之 `createViteConfig`，与 `rich-editor` 同模式，启用 `jsx: 'automatic'`。
- **`tsconfig.json`** 循 `rich-style-token` 之例，`jsx: "react-jsx"`，`moduleResolution: "bundler"`。
- **`RichSSRRenderer.tsx`** 以 `@lexical/headless` 之 `createHeadlessEditor` 解析 `SerializedEditorState`，经 `$getRoot` 遍历 node tree，decorator node 取 `getDecorators<ReactNode>()` 渲染，builtin node 则由 `renderBuiltinNode` / `renderTextNode` 映射为 React elements。外层以 `PortalThemeProvider`、`ColorSchemeProvider`、`RendererConfigProvider`、`FootnoteDefinitionsProvider`、`NestedContentRendererProvider` 层层包裹，确保 context 完备。
- **`preprocess/footnote.ts`** 遍历 editor state JSON，收集 footnote identifier 与 definition，生成 `displayNumberMap`。
- **`preprocess/headingSlug.ts`** 提供 `textToSlug` 工具函数。
- **`engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`** 处理 paragraph、heading（含 slug 去重）、quote、list、link、table、code、linebreak 等 builtin node type。

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user provided a comprehensive implementation plan titled "RichSSRRenderer 实施计划" to make the Lexical-based rich editor's Static rendering path 100% SSR-safe and build a headless SSR rendering engine (`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer`). The plan has 5 phases:
   - Phase 0: Foundation (NestedContentRendererContext, extractTextContent utility)
   - Phase 1: Node refactoring (5 nodes: Alert, Banner, Grid, Tldraw, Gallery) to split Static/Edit properly, plus FootnoteRenderer split
   - Phase 2: SSR adaptations (LinkCardRenderer useLayoutEffect fix, MermaidRenderer fallback)
   - Phase 3: Create `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` headless engine package
   - Phase 4: `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` + Web integration (SSR entries)
   - Phase 5: Regression verification

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Static/Edit Node Split**: Static nodes store only serializable data (`SerializedEditorState`), no `LexicalEditor` instances. Edit nodes extend static, manage `LexicalEditor` instances, own `slashMenuItems`.
   - **NestedContentRendererContext**: A React context providing a `(state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode` function for rendering nested editor content (alert/banner/grid cells) without `LexicalNestedComposer`.
   - **`@lexical/headless`**: Used in SSR engine to parse `SerializedEditorState` and get decorators without browser APIs.
   - **`editable: false`**: Critical setting ensuring `decorate()` returns static path (no edit callbacks).
   - **Import boundaries**: SSR engine only imports from `@haklex/rich-editor/static` and `@haklex/rich-editor/styles`, never the root entry. Static renderers never import `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`.
   - **RendererWrapper / createRendererDecoration**: Pattern for custom renderer injection via `RendererConfig` context.
   - **Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS**: Styling system used throughout the editor packages.

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Provides `RenderEditorStateFn` type and context for rendering nested `SerializedEditorState` to ReactNode
     - Used by AlertStaticDecorator, BannerStaticDecorator, GridStaticDecorator

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/utils/extractTextContent.ts`** (NEW)
     - Walks serialized editor state JSON to extract plain text
     - Replaces `$getRoot().getTextContent()` calls that required live `LexicalEditor`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` → `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`
     - Removed: `createContentEditor()`, `getContentEditor()`, `static slashMenuItems`
     - Added: `getContentState()`, `setContentState()`
     - `getTextContent()` uses `extractTextContent(this.__contentState)`
     - `decorate()` → `createElement(AlertStaticDecorator, { alertType, contentState })`
     - `$createAlertQuoteNode(alertType, contentState?)` now accepts optional contentState

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Now has `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` field
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (3 items: Callout, Tip, Warning) moved from base
     - Constructor creates editor and parses contentState into it
     - `getContentEditor()` method
     - `exportJSON()` reads from `__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()`
     - `decorate()` → `AlertEditDecorator` with `nodeKey`, `alertType`, `contentEditor`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Uses `useNestedContentRenderer()` to render nested content
     - Renders `RendererWrapper` for Alert header + nested content div

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Same pattern as AlertQuoteNode: `__contentEditor` → `__contentState`
     - Removed `slashMenuItems`, `getContentEditor()`, `createContentEditor()`
     - Legacy `children` support preserved in `importJSON`
     - `decorate()` → `BannerStaticDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Same pattern as AlertQuoteEditNode
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (1 item: Banner)
     - Constructor creates editor from contentState
     - Legacy children support in importJSON

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/BannerStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Same pattern as AlertStaticDecorator but with banner-specific markup

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]`
     - Removed: `createCellEditor()`, `getCellEditors()`, `slashMenuItems`
     - Added: `getCellStates()`
     - `setCols()`, `addCells()`, `removeCells()` operate on `__cellStates`
     - `removeCells()` uses `extractTextContent()` for emptiness check
     - `decorate()` → `GridStaticDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Has `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` synced with `__cellStates`
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (1 item: Grid)
     - Constructor creates editors from cellStates
     - Overrides `setCols()`, `addCells()`, `removeCells()` to sync editors
     - `exportJSON()` reads from editors
     - `decorate()` → `GridEditDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/GridStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - CSS grid layout rendering cells via `useNestedContentRenderer()`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added import of `$isGridEditNode`
     - Changed `$isGridContainerNode` → `$isGridEditNode` for `getCellEditors()` call (line ~68)

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Removed: `slashMenuItems`, lazy imports (`LazyStaticRenderer`, `LazyEditRenderer`), `isEditable()` branch
     - `decorate()` → always returns `TldrawSSRRenderer` (no branch)

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Pure SSR placeholder with shape count from snapshot JSON
     - Zero browser API, zero edit-ui

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditNode.ts`** (NEW)
     - Extends TldrawNode, has `static slashMenuItems`
     - `decorate()` with `isEditable` branch: edit → LazyEditRenderer, else → LazyDisplayRenderer

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx`** → **RENAMED to `TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`**
     - Export renamed from `TldrawStaticRenderer` to `TldrawDisplayRenderer`
     - Contains the interactive tldraw canvas viewer (NOT SSR safe, uses browser APIs in useEffect)

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawPlugin.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - `$createTldrawNode` → `$createTldrawEditNode`

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/index.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Added exports: `TldrawEditNode`, `$createTldrawEditNode`, `$isTldrawEditNode`, `TldrawSSRRenderer`, `TldrawDisplayRenderer`
     - Backward compat: `TldrawStaticRenderer` = `TldrawDisplayRenderer`, `TldrawRenderer` = `TldrawDisplayRenderer`

   - **`packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Removed: `slashMenuItems`, `isEditable()` branch in `decorate()`
     - `decorate()` → pure static props `{ images, layout }` only

   - **`packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryEditNode.ts`** (NEW)
     - Extends GalleryNode, has `static slashMenuItems`
     - `decorate()` adds `onImagesChange`/`onLayoutChange` callbacks

   - **`packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/index.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added exports: `GalleryEditNode`, `$createGalleryEditNode`, `$isGalleryEditNode`, `galleryEditNodes`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteStaticRenderer.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Plain `<a>` link with aria attributes, no Tooltip, no `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`
     - Same click-to-scroll behavior as FootnoteRenderer but without Tooltip wrapper

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/FootnoteNode.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Import changed: `FootnoteRenderer` → `FootnoteStaticRenderer`
     - `decorate()` uses `FootnoteStaticRenderer` as default

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/alert.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Import: `$createAlertQuoteEditNode` from `AlertQuoteEditNode`
     - Creates `$createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, content)` directly instead of using `getContentEditor()`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Import: `$createBannerEditNode` from `BannerEditNode`
     - Creates `$createBannerEditNode(bannerType, content)` directly

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/grid-container.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - `getCellEditors().map(editor => editor.getEditorState().read(...))` → `getCellStates().map(state => extractTextContent(state))`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/AlertPlugin.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - `$createAlertQuoteNode` → `$createAlertQuoteEditNode`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added `NestedContentRendererProvider` wrapping the component tree
     - Added `NestedLexicalRenderer` helper component that creates a nested `LexicalComposer`
     - `renderNestedContent` callback creates nested Lexical renderer for each `SerializedEditorState`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added exports: `FootnoteRenderer` (value), `FootnoteStaticRenderer`, `FootnoteStaticRendererProps`, `NestedContentRendererProvider`, `useNestedContentRenderer`, `RenderEditorStateFn`, `extractTextContent`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/static-entry.ts`** (NEW)
     - Entry point for SSR engine: exports allNodes, editorTheme, contexts, RendererWrapper, variant classes, etc.
     - Has Lexical dependency (editorTheme uses `EditorThemeClasses` type)

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/styles-entry.ts`** (NEW)
     - Zero Lexical dependency styles entry: variant classes, vars, getVariantClass
     - Does NOT export `editorTheme`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/package.json`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added exports: `./static` → `./src/static-entry.ts`, `./styles` → `./src/styles-entry.ts`
     - Added publishConfig exports for static and styles

   - **`packages/rich-editor/vite.config.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added entry points: `'static-entry': 'src/static-entry.ts'`, `'styles-entry': 'src/styles-entry.ts'`

   - **`packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts`** (UNCHANGED - enhancedRendererConfig)

   - **`packages/rich-renderers/src/index.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added exports: `galleryEditNodes`, `GalleryEditNode`, `$createGalleryEditNode`, `$isGalleryEditNode`, `TldrawDisplayRenderer`, `TldrawEditNode`, `$createTldrawEditNode`, `$isTldrawEditNode`

   - **`packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/config.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added `FootnoteRenderer` import from `@haklex/rich-editor`
     - Added `Footnote: FootnoteRenderer` to `enhancedEditRendererConfig`

   - **`packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/index.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added exports: `$createTldrawEditNode`, `$isTldrawEditNode`, `TldrawEditNode`

   - **`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - `TldrawNode` → `TldrawEditNode`, `galleryNodes` → `galleryEditNodes` (imports from `@haklex/rich-renderers`)

   - **`packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - `useLayoutEffect` → `useEffect` (SSR safety)

   - **`packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidRenderer.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Loading state changed from `<div>Mermaid Loading</div>` to `<pre><code>{content}</code></pre>` for SSR fallback

   - **`packages/rich-ssr-renderer/`** (NEW PACKAGE - created by agent)
     - `src/index.ts`, `src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx`, `src/types.ts`
     - `src/engine/renderNode.tsx`, `src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`, `src/engine/renderTextNode.tsx`
     - `src/preprocess/footnote.ts`, `src/preprocess/headingSlug.ts`
     - `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `vite.config.ts`
     - Uses `createHeadlessEditor` from `@lexical/headless`, imports from `@haklex/rich-editor/static`

   - **`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx`** (NEW - created by agent)
     - `ShiroSSRRenderer` wrapping `RichSSRRenderer` with `enhancedRendererConfig` and default extra nodes

   - **`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css`** (NEW - created by agent)
     - SSR-only CSS imports (no edit-ui CSS)

   - **`packages/rich-kit-shiro/package.json`** (MODIFIED by agent)
     - Added `./ssr` and `./style-ssr.css` exports, added `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` dependency

   - **`packages/rich-kit-shiro/vite.config.ts`** (MODIFIED by agent)
     - Added `ssr` entry

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - All TypeScript diagnostics shown are expected monorepo module resolution warnings (`Cannot find module 'lexical'`, etc.) - these are normal for pnpm workspace packages with peer dependencies and resolve during build.
   - The `TldrawEditNodeClass` type export was initially added to tldraw index.ts but didn't exist - fixed by removing that line.
   - The `FootnoteRenderer` import in `rich-renderers-edit/config.ts` was initially attempted from `@haklex/rich-editor/renderer-internals` (non-existent) - fixed by importing from `@haklex/rich-editor` root after adding the value export.
   - The `Write` tool refused to write transformer files because they were read by an agent (not in main context) - fixed by re-reading the files first then writing.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Successfully refactored 5 node types (Alert, Banner, Grid, Tldraw, Gallery) from holding `LexicalEditor` instances to storing `SerializedEditorState`
   - Created the `NestedContentRendererContext` pattern to allow static decorators to render nested content without `LexicalNestedComposer`
   - Split `FootnoteRenderer` into SSR-safe (no Tooltip) and edit/CSR (with Tooltip) variants
   - Created the complete `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` package with headless rendering engine
   - Created SSR integration in `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro`

6. All User Messages:
   - Message 1: "Implement the following plan:" followed by the complete RichSSRRenderer implementation plan (very long, detailed multi-phase plan with exact file changes, code snippets, constraints, and verification steps)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Phase 5: Regression verification** - Build verification, SSR constraint checks, static renderer zero edit-ui checks, slashMenuItems placement checks, editor link verification
   - **Build verification**: `pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build`
   - **Verify agent-created files**: The `rich-ssr-renderer` package and `kit-shiro` SSR files were created by agents; should verify their content matches the plan
   - **pnpm-workspace.yaml**: May need to add `rich-ssr-renderer` to the workspace if not auto-detected
   - **Web app Server Component**: Plan mentions `apps/web/.../LexicalContent.server.tsx` but this was not yet created
   - **`@lexical/headless` dependency**: May need to be added to `@haklex/rich-editor`'s dependencies per the plan

8. Current Work:
   Immediately before summarization, the two agents had just completed:
   1. Creating the `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` package (all 11 files)
   2. Creating the `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` SSR integration (ssr.tsx, style-ssr.css, package.json updates, vite.config.ts updates)
   
   All Phase 0-4 file changes have been written. The implementation is structurally complete but has not been build-verified.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Run build verification as specified in Phase 5 of the plan:
   ```bash
   pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
   ```

1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user provided a comprehensive implementation plan titled "RichSSRRenderer 实施计划" to make the Lexical-based rich editor's Static rendering path 100% SSR-safe and build a headless SSR rendering engine (`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer`). The plan has 5 phases:

   - **NestedContentRendererContext**: A React context providing a `(state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode` function for rendering nested editor content (alert/banner/grid cells) without `LexicalNestedComposer`.
   - **`@lexical/headless`**: Used in SSR engine to parse `SerializedEditorState` and get decorators without browser APIs.
   - **`editable: false`**: Critical setting ensuring `decorate()` returns static path (no edit callbacks).
   - **Import boundaries**: SSR engine only imports from `@haklex/rich-editor/static` and `@haklex/rich-editor/styles`, never the root entry. Static renderers never import `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`.
   - **RendererWrapper / createRendererDecoration**: Pattern for custom renderer injection via `RendererConfig` context.
   - **Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS**: Styling system used throughout the editor packages.

3. Files and Code Sections:

     - Now has `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` field
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (3 items: Callout, Tip, Warning) moved from base
     - Constructor creates editor and parses contentState into it
     - `getContentEditor()` method
     - `exportJSON()` reads from `__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()`
     - `decorate()` → `AlertEditDecorator` with `nodeKey`, `alertType`, `contentEditor`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Uses `useNestedContentRenderer()` to render nested content
     - Renders `RendererWrapper` for Alert header + nested content div

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Same pattern as AlertQuoteNode: `__contentEditor` → `__contentState`
     - Removed `slashMenuItems`, `getContentEditor()`, `createContentEditor()`
     - Legacy `children` support preserved in `importJSON`
     - `decorate()` → `BannerStaticDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Same pattern as AlertQuoteEditNode
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (1 item: Banner)

     - Legacy children support in importJSON

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/BannerStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Same pattern as AlertStaticDecorator but with banner-specific markup

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]`
     - Removed: `createCellEditor()`, `getCellEditors()`, `slashMenuItems`
     - Added: `getCellStates()`
     - `setCols()`, `addCells()`, `removeCells()` operate on `__cellStates`
     - `removeCells()` uses `extractTextContent()` for emptiness check
     - `decorate()` → `GridStaticDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Has `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` synced with `__cellStates`
     - Has `static slashMenuItems` (1 item: Grid)
     - Constructor creates editors from cellStates
     - Overrides `setCols()`, `addCells()`, `removeCells()` to sync editors
     - `exportJSON()` reads from editors
     - `decorate()` → `GridEditDecorator`

   - **`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/GridStaticDecorator.tsx`** (NEW)
     - CSS grid layout rendering cells via `useNestedContentRenderer()`

     - Added import of `$isGridEditNode`

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`** (NEW)

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditNode.ts`** (NEW)
     - Extends TldrawNode, has `static slashMenuItems`
     - `decorate()` with `isEditable` branch: edit → LazyEditRenderer, else → LazyDisplayRenderer

   - **`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx`** → **RENAMED to `TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`**

     - `$createTldrawNode` → `$createTldrawEditNode`

 `./packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
     2→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     3→import {
     4→  allNodes,
     5→  ColorSchemeProvider,
     6→  editorTheme,
     7→  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
     8→  getVariantClass,
     9→  NestedContentRendererProvider,
    10→  RendererConfigProvider,
    11→} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
    12→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    13→import { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    14→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    15→
    16→import { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
    17→import { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
    18→import { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
    19→import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from './types'
    20→
    21→function renderTree(
    22→  node: any,
    23→  decorations: Record<string, ReactNode>,
    24→  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    25→  key: string,
    26→): ReactNode {
    27→  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key
    28→
    29→  if (decorations[nodeKey] !== undefined) {
    30→    return decorations[nodeKey]
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
    34→
    35→  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
    36→    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
    40→  if (node.getChildren) {
    41→    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
    42→    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
    43→      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
    44→        renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
    45→      )
    46→    }
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
    50→}
    51→
    52→function renderEditorToReact(
    53→  value: SerializedEditorState,
    54→  nodes: any[],
    55→): { content: ReactNode; footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>; renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode } {
    56→  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
    57→    nodes,
    58→    theme: editorTheme,
    59→    editable: false,
    60→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    61→      console.error('[RichSSRRenderer]', error)
    62→    },
    63→  })
    64→
    65→  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
    66→  editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    67→
    68→  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
    69→  const decorations = editor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()
    70→
    71→  let content: ReactNode = null
    72→  editorState.read(() => {
    73→    const root = $getRoot()
    74→    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    75→    const children = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
    76→      renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `ssr-${i}`),
    77→    )
    78→    content = <>{children}</>
    79→  })
    80→
    81→  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
    82→    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
    83→      nodes,
    84→      theme: editorTheme,
    85→      editable: false,
    86→      onError: (error: Error) => {
    87→        console.error('[RichSSRRenderer:nested]', error)
    88→      },
    89→    })
    90→    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
    91→    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
    92→    const nestedDecorations = nestedEditor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()
    93→    let nested: ReactNode = null
    94→    nestedState.read(() => {
    95→      const root = $getRoot()
    96→      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    97→      const ch = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
    98→        renderTree(child, nestedDecorations, headingSlugs, `nested-${i}`),
    99→      )
   100→      nested = <>{ch}</>
   101→    })
   102→    return nested
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
   106→}
   107→
   108→export function RichSSRRenderer({
   109→  value,
   110→  variant = 'article',
   111→  theme = 'light',
   112→  className,
   113→  style,
   114→  as: Component = 'div',
   115→  rendererConfig,
   116→  extraNodes,
   117→}: RichSSRRendererProps) {
   118→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
   119→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
   120→
   121→  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(value, nodes)
   122→
   123→  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')
   124→
   125→  return (
   126→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
   127→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
   128→        <RendererConfigProvider
   129→          config={rendererConfig}
   130→          mode="renderer"
   131→          variant={variant}
   132→        >
   133→          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   134→            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
   135→            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
   136→          >
   137→            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
   138→              <Component
   139→                className={classes}
   140→                style={style}
   141→                data-theme={theme}
   142→              >
   143→                {content}
   144→              </Component>
   145→            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
   146→          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   147→        </RendererConfigProvider>
   148→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   149→    </PortalThemeProvider>
   150→  )
   151→}
   152→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→
     3→function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     4→  return text
     5→    .toLowerCase()
     6→    .trim()
     7→    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
     8→    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
     9→    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    10→}
    11→
    12→function extractText(node: any): string {
    13→  if (node.text) return node.text
    14→  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    15→  return ''
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function renderBuiltinNode(
    19→  node: any,
    20→  key: string,
    21→  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    22→  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    23→): ReactNode {
    24→  switch (node.type) {
    25→    case 'root':
    26→      return <>{children}</>
    27→    case 'paragraph': {
    28→      const align = node.format ? { textAlign: node.format } as const : undefined
    29→      return <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>{children}</p>
    30→    }
    31→    case 'heading': {
    32→      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    33→      const text = extractText(node)
    34→      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    35→      let slug = baseSlug
    36→      if (baseSlug) {
    37→        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    38→        if (count !== undefined) {
    39→          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    40→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    41→        } else {
    42→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    43→        }
    44→      }
    45→      return (
    46→        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    47→          {slug && <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />}
    48→          {children}
    49→        </Tag>
    50→      )
    51→    }
    52→    case 'quote':
    53→      return <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">{children}</blockquote>
    54→    case 'list': {
    55→      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    56→      const cls = node.listType === 'number' ? 'rich-list-ol'
    57→        : node.listType === 'check' ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul' : 'rich-list-ul'
    58→      return <Tag key={key} className={cls} start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}>{children}</Tag>
    59→    }
    60→    case 'listitem': {
    61→      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    62→      const cls = isChecklist
    63→        ? (node.checked ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked' : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked')
    64→        : 'rich-list-item'
    65→      return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
    66→    }
    67→    case 'link':
    68→      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target={node.target} rel={node.rel}>{children}</a>
    69→    case 'autolink':
    70→      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{children}</a>
    71→    case 'horizontalrule':
    72→      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
    73→    case 'table':
    74→      return (
    75→        <div key={key} className="rich-table-scrollable-wrapper">
    76→          <table className="rich-table">{children}</table>
    77→        </div>
    78→      )
    79→    case 'tablerow':
    80→      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
    81→    case 'tablecell': {
    82→      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
    83→      const cls = node.headerState ? 'rich-table-cell-header' : 'rich-table-cell'
    84→      return <CellTag key={key} className={cls} colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}>{children}</CellTag>
    85→    }
    86→    case 'code':
    87→      return <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block"><code>{children}</code></pre>
    88→    case 'code-highlight':
    89→      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
    90→    case 'linebreak':
    91→      return <br key={key} />
    92→    case 'tab':
    93→      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
    94→    default:
    95→      return null
    96→  }
    97→}
    98→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderTextNode.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→
     3→const FORMAT_FLAGS: [number, string][] = [
     4→  [1, 'rich-text-bold'],
     5→  [2, 'rich-text-italic'],
     6→  [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
     7→  [8, 'rich-text-underline'],
     8→  [16, 'rich-text-code'],
     9→  [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
    10→  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'],
    11→  [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
    12→]
    13→
    14→export function renderTextNode(node: any, key: string): ReactNode {
    15→  let element: ReactNode = node.text
    16→  const format = node.format || 0
    17→
    18→  for (const [flag, className] of FORMAT_FLAGS) {
    19→    if (format & flag) {
    20→      element = <span key={`${key}-${flag}`} className={className}>{element}</span>
    21→    }
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  return element
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 13:36:37Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/preprocess/footnote.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     2→
     3→export interface FootnoteData {
     4→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     5→  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function preprocessFootnotes(state: SerializedEditorState): FootnoteData {
     9→  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
    10→  const seen = new Set<string>()
    11→  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    12→  let counter = 1
    13→
    14→  function walk(node: any): void {
    15→    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
    16→      const id = node.identifier
    17→      if (!seen.has(id)) {
    18→        seen.add(id)
    19→        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
    20→      }
    21→    }
    22→    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
    23→      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    24→    }
    25→    if (node.children) {
    26→      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    27→    }
    28→    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    29→    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
    30→      walk(node.content)
    31→    }
    32→    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
    33→      for (const cell of node.cells) {
    34→        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
    35→      }
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  walk(state)
    40→
    41→  for (const id of seen) {
    42→    if (!(id in definitions)) {
    43→      definitions[id] = ''
    44→    }
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
    48→}
    49→
```
</details></tool-use>

- ✓ Proper TypeScript configuration (strict mode, declaration maps)
- ✓ Vanilla Extract for zero-runtime CSS theming

**Minor Notes**:
- `renderBuiltinNode.tsx` includes inline `textToSlug()` function (duplicated in `headingSlug.ts` — could be unified, but acceptable for SSR package)
- `RichSSRRenderer.tsx` passes `any` type to `renderTree()` (line 22) — intentional for Lexical node traversal, safe here
- `footnote.ts` `walk()` function uses `any` (necessary for dynamic node structure)

---

### Summary

✓ **All verification checks PASSED**

- No forbidden imports from `@haklex/rich-editor` root or `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`
- Zero browser globals (window/document/navigator)
- Dependencies correctly declared with peer deps
- All referenced files exist and are properly integrated
- SSR-safe implementation with strict type safety

Package is **production-ready** for SSR rendering of Lexical editor state.

```text
     5→  embedNodes,
     6→  enhancedRendererConfig,
     7→  galleryNodes,
     8→  TldrawNode,
     9→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    10→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    12→
    13→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    14→  TldrawNode,
    15→  ...embedNodes,
    16→  ...galleryNodes,
    17→  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18→]
    19→
    20→export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
    21→  RichSSRRendererProps,
    22→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23→> {
    24→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
    28→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29→    () =>
    30→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31→    [extraNodes],
    32→  )
    33→
    34→  return (
    35→    <RichSSRRenderer
    36→      {...props}
    37→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38→      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    39→    />
    40→  )
    41→}
    42→
```

```text
{"threadId":"019c9507-b488-7d90-8869-8a33cf0095ea","content":"**Findings (by severity)**\n\n1. **High**: Backward-compatibility regression for existing Tldraw usage  \n   In [`TldrawNode.ts:72`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts:72), `decorate()` now always renders SSR display output, without the prior editable branch (`editor.isEditable()` path).  \n   Impact: integrations still registering/using `TldrawNode` (or persisted content expecting editable behavior) will no longer be editable unless they fully migrate to `TldrawEditNode`.\n\n2. **Medium**: `RichSSRRenderer` default node set is incomplete for common Shiro content  \n   In [`RichSSRRenderer.tsx:108`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx:108), default `extraNodes` is `allNodes`, but that set does not include several renderer package nodes (e.g. gallery/tldraw/embed-like extensions).  \n   [`ssr.tsx:3`](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx:3) works around this by building `defaultExtraNodes` from `@haklex/rich-renderers`.  \n   Impact: direct consumers of `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` can silently miss blocks unless they manually wire extension nodes, which is a compatibility/API footgun.\n\n**Open questions / assumptions**\n\n1. Is migration from `TldrawNode` to `TldrawEditNode` guaranteed for all downstream consumers and old documents? If not, issue #1 is a real break.\n2. Is `RichSSRRenderer` intended to be framework-agnostic/minimal by design? _**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 13:56:32Z)**_
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The Codex review found two issues:

1. **High: TldrawNode backward compat** - This is by design per the plan. `TldrawNode.decorate()` now always returns SSR renderer. The `TldrawEditNode` (registered in `config-edit.ts` / `allEditNodes`) handles the editable path. Consumers using `RichEditor` will use `allEditNodes` which includes `TldrawEditNode`. This is the intended Static/Edit split pattern. Not a regression - by design.

2. **Medium: RichSSRRenderer default nodes** - Also by design. `allNodes` contains the core nodes from `@haklex/rich-editor`. Extension nodes (tldraw, gallery, embed, code-snippet) are passed via `extraNodes` prop. 

The same pattern applies throughout the codebase—`ShiroSSRRenderer` in `kit-shiro` follows the same composition approach as `RichRenderer` and `RichEditor`. Both findings align with the planned architecture, so there are no actual bugs. All phases are complete, builds pass, and constraint checks are passing.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 13:56:40Z)**_

Codex 审查完毕。两项发现均为预期设计：

1. **TldrawNode.decorate() 无编辑分支** — 此乃 Static/Edit 双轨设计之本意。`allEditNodes` 含 `TldrawEditNode`，`RichEditor` 走编辑路径无碍。
2. **RichSSRRenderer 默认节点不含扩展** — 与 `RichRenderer` 模式一致，扩展节点由 `extraNodes` prop 注入。`ShiroSSRRenderer` 已组装完整节点集。
